title: iFlyBot-VLA Technical Report
summary: We introduce iFlyBot-VLA, a large-scale Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model trained under a novel framework. The main contributions are listed as follows: (1) a latent action model thoroughly trained on large-scale human and robotic manipulation videos; (2) a dual-level action representation framework that jointly supervises both the Vision-Language Model (VLM) and the action expert during training; (3) a mixed training strategy that combines robot trajectory data with general QA and spatial QA datasets, effectively enhancing the 3D perceptual and reasoning capabilities of the VLM backbone. Specifically, the VLM is trained to predict two complementary forms of actions: latent actions, derived from our latent action model pretrained on cross-embodiment manipulation data, which capture implicit high-level intentions; and structured discrete action tokens, obtained through frequency-domain transformations of continuous control signals, which encode explicit low-level dynamics. This dual supervision aligns the representation spaces of language, vision, and action, enabling the VLM to directly contribute to action generation. Experimental results on the LIBERO Franka benchmark demonstrate the superiority of our frame-work, while real-world evaluations further show that iFlyBot-VLA achieves competitive success rates across diverse and challenging manipulation tasks. Furthermore, we plan to open-source a portion of our self-constructed dataset to support future research in the community
tldr: iFlyBot-VLA introduces a large-scale Vision-Language-Action model trained with dual-level action representation and mixed training to improve VLM's action generation and manipulation capabilities, demonstrating competitive results on manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: iFlyBot-VLA 介绍了一种大规模的视觉-语言-动作模型，通过双层动作表示和混合训练进行训练，以提高视觉-语言模型的动作生成和操作能力，并在操作任务上展示了具有竞争力的结果。
summary_zh: 我们提出了iFlyBot-VLA，一个基于新型框架训练的大规模视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型。 主要贡献如下：（1）在大型人类和机器人操作视频上充分训练的潜在动作模型；（2）一种双层动作表示框架，在训练期间共同监督视觉-语言模型（VLM）和动作专家；（3）一种混合训练策略，将机器人轨迹数据与通用QA和空间QA数据集相结合，有效增强了VLM骨干网络的3D感知和推理能力。 具体而言，VLM被训练来预测两种互补形式的动作：潜在动作，来源于我们预训练的跨具身操作数据的潜在动作模型，捕捉隐式的高层意图；和结构化离散动作令牌，通过连续控制信号的频域变换获得，编码显式的低层动力学。 这种双重监督对齐了语言、视觉和动作的表示空间，使VLM能够直接贡献于动作生成。 在LIBERO Franka基准上的实验结果证明了我们框架的优越性，而真实世界的评估进一步表明，iFlyBot-VLA在各种具有挑战性的操作任务中取得了具有竞争力的成功率。此外，我们计划开源部分自构建数据集，以支持社区未来的研究。

title: Improving Robustness to Out-of-Distribution States in Imitation Learning via Deep Koopman-Boosted Diffusion Policy
summary: Integrating generative models with action chunking has shown significant promise in imitation learning for robotic manipulation. However, the existing diffusion-based paradigm often struggles to capture strong temporal dependencies across multiple steps, particularly when incorporating proprioceptive input. This limitation can lead to task failures, where the policy overfits to proprioceptive cues at the expense of capturing the visually derived features of the task. To overcome this challenge, we propose the Deep Koopman-boosted Dual-branch Diffusion Policy (D3P) algorithm. D3P introduces a dual-branch architecture to decouple the roles of different sensory modality combinations. The visual branch encodes the visual observations to indicate task progression, while the fused branch integrates both visual and proprioceptive inputs for precise manipulation. Within this architecture, when the robot fails to accomplish intermediate goals, such as grasping a drawer handle, the policy can dynamically switch to execute action chunks generated by the visual branch, allowing recovery to previously observed states and facilitating retrial of the task. To further enhance visual representation learning, we incorporate a Deep Koopman Operator module that captures structured temporal dynamics from visual inputs. During inference, we use the test-time loss of the generative model as a confidence signal to guide the aggregation of the temporally overlapping predicted action chunks, thereby enhancing the reliability of policy execution. In simulation experiments across six RLBench tabletop tasks, D3P outperforms the state-of-the-art diffusion policy by an average of 14.6\%. On three real-world robotic manipulation tasks, it achieves a 15.0\% improvement. Code: https://github.com/dianyeHuang/D3P.
tldr: This paper introduces D3P, a Deep Koopman-boosted Dual-branch Diffusion Policy for imitation learning that improves robustness to out-of-distribution states in robotic manipulation by decoupling sensory modalities and using a visual branch to recover from task failures. It shows significant performance improvements in simulated and real-world environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了D3P，一种深度Koopman增强的双分支扩散策略，用于模仿学习，通过解耦感觉模态并使用视觉分支从任务失败中恢复，从而提高机器人操作中对分布外状态的鲁棒性。它在模拟和现实环境中都显示出显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 将生成模型与动作组块集成已在机器人操作的模仿学习中展现出显著潜力。然而，现有的基于扩散的范式通常难以捕捉跨多个步骤的强时间依赖性，尤其是在整合本体感觉输入时。这种局限性可能导致任务失败，即策略过度拟合本体感觉线索，而牺牲了对任务视觉衍生特征的捕捉。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了深度Koopman提升的双分支扩散策略（D3P）算法。D3P引入了一种双分支架构，以解耦不同感觉模态组合的作用。视觉分支编码视觉观察结果以指示任务进展，而融合分支集成视觉和本体感觉输入以实现精确操作。在这种架构中，当机器人未能完成中间目标时，例如抓住抽屉把手，策略可以动态切换到执行由视觉分支生成的动作组块，从而允许恢复到先前观察到的状态，并促进任务的重试。为了进一步增强视觉表征学习，我们引入了一个深度Koopman算子模块，该模块从视觉输入中捕捉结构化的时间动态。在推理过程中，我们使用生成模型的测试时损失作为置信度信号，以指导对时间上重叠的预测动作组块的聚合，从而提高策略执行的可靠性。在六个RLBench桌面任务的仿真实验中，D3P的性能比最先进的扩散策略平均高出14.6%。在三个真实世界的机器人操作任务中，它实现了15.0%的改进。代码：https://github.com/dianyeHuang/D3P.

title: Bootstrap Off-policy with World Model
summary: Online planning has proven effective in reinforcement learning (RL) for improving sample efficiency and final performance. However, using planning for environment interaction inevitably introduces a divergence between the collected data and the policy's actual behaviors, degrading both model learning and policy improvement. To address this, we propose BOOM (Bootstrap Off-policy with WOrld Model), a framework that tightly integrates planning and off-policy learning through a bootstrap loop: the policy initializes the planner, and the planner refines actions to bootstrap the policy through behavior alignment. This loop is supported by a jointly learned world model, which enables the planner to simulate future trajectories and provides value targets to facilitate policy improvement. The core of BOOM is a likelihood-free alignment loss that bootstraps the policy using the planner's non-parametric action distribution, combined with a soft value-weighted mechanism that prioritizes high-return behaviors and mitigates variability in the planner's action quality within the replay buffer. Experiments on the high-dimensional DeepMind Control Suite and Humanoid-Bench show that BOOM achieves state-of-the-art results in both training stability and final performance. The code is accessible at https://github.com/molumitu/BOOM_MBRL.
tldr: The paper introduces BOOM, a reinforcement learning framework that integrates planning and off-policy learning with a bootstrap loop and a jointly learned world model, achieving state-of-the-art results on benchmark tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为BOOM的强化学习框架，它通过自举循环和一个联合学习的世界模型整合了规划和离线策略学习，并在基准任务上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 在线规划已被证明在强化学习(RL)中能有效提高样本效率和最终性能。然而，使用规划进行环境交互不可避免地会在收集的数据和策略的实际行为之间引入差异，从而降低模型学习和策略改进的效果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 BOOM (Bootstrap Off-policy with WOrld Model)，一个通过引导循环紧密集成规划和离线策略学习的框架：策略初始化规划器，规划器通过行为对齐细化动作，从而引导策略。这种循环由一个联合学习的世界模型支撑，该模型使规划器能够模拟未来轨迹，并提供价值目标以促进策略改进。BOOM 的核心是一个无似然对齐损失，它使用规划器的非参数动作分布引导策略，并结合一个软性价值加权机制，该机制优先考虑高回报行为，并减轻回放缓冲区中规划器动作质量的变异性。在高维 DeepMind Control Suite 和 Humanoid-Bench 上的实验表明，BOOM 在训练稳定性和最终性能方面都达到了最先进水平。代码可在 https://github.com/molumitu/BOOM_MBRL 获取。

title: Foundation Models for Trajectory Planning in Autonomous Driving: A Review of Progress and Open Challenges
summary: The emergence of multi-modal foundation models has markedly transformed the technology for autonomous driving, shifting away from conventional and mostly hand-crafted design choices towards unified, foundation-model-based approaches, capable of directly inferring motion trajectories from raw sensory inputs. This new class of methods can also incorporate natural language as an additional modality, with Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models serving as a representative example. In this review, we provide a comprehensive examination of such methods through a unifying taxonomy to critically evaluate their architectural design choices, methodological strengths, and their inherent capabilities and limitations. Our survey covers 37 recently proposed approaches that span the landscape of trajectory planning with foundation models. Furthermore, we assess these approaches with respect to the openness of their source code and datasets, offering valuable information to practitioners and researchers. We provide an accompanying webpage that catalogs the methods based on our taxonomy, available at: https://github.com/fiveai/FMs-for-driving-trajectories
tldr: This paper reviews the application of foundation models, particularly Vision-Language-Action models, for trajectory planning in autonomous driving, offering a taxonomy and evaluation of recent approaches and their open-source availability.
tldr_zh: 本文综述了基础模型（特别是视觉-语言-动作模型）在自动驾驶轨迹规划中的应用，提供了一个分类法，并评估了最新的方法及其开源可用性。
summary_zh: 多模态基础模型的出现显著改变了自动驾驶技术，使其从传统的、主要为手工设计选择的方法转向统一的、基于基础模型的方法，这种方法能够直接从原始感知输入中推断运动轨迹。这种新型方法还可以将自然语言作为一种额外的模态，以视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型为代表。在这篇综述中，我们通过一个统一的分类体系来全面考察这些方法，以批判性地评估其架构设计选择、方法优势以及固有的能力和局限性。我们的调查涵盖了37种最近提出的方法，这些方法覆盖了使用基础模型进行轨迹规划的各个方面。此外，我们还评估了这些方法在源代码和数据集开放程度方面的表现，为从业者和研究人员提供有价值的信息。我们提供一个配套网页，该网页根据我们的分类体系对这些方法进行分类，网址为：https://github.com/fiveai/FMs-for-driving-trajectories

title: UME-R1: Exploring Reasoning-Driven Generative Multimodal Embeddings
summary: The remarkable success of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has driven advances in multimodal embeddings, yet existing models remain inherently discriminative, limiting their ability to benefit from reasoning-driven generation paradigm. In this work, we pioneer the exploration of generative embeddings, unifying embedding tasks within a generative paradigm. We propose UME-R1, a universal multimodal embedding framework consisting of a two-stage training strategy: a cold-start supervised fine-tuning equips the model with reasoning capabilities and enables it to generate both discriminative and generative embeddings; a subsequent reinforcement learning enhances reasoning and further optimizes generative embedding quality. This pioneering work reveals four key insights: 1) generative embeddings unlock substantial performance gains over conventional discriminative embeddings by leveraging the powerful generative reasoning capabilities of MLLMs; 2) discriminative and generative embeddings are complementary, whose combined oracle performance far exceeding that of either alone; 3) RL can effectively enhance generative embeddings, establishing a scalable optimization paradigm.; 4) repeated sampling at inference boosts downstream task coverage (pass@k), highlighting the inference-time scalability potential of generative embeddings. Evaluated on the MMEB-V2 benchmark across 78 tasks spanning video, image, and visual documents, UME-R1 significantly outperforms conventional discriminative embedding models and offers a foundation for more interpretable, reasoning-driven generative multimodal embeddings. Our code, models, and datasets will be publicly available at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/UME-R1.
tldr: The paper introduces UME-R1, a novel framework for generative multimodal embeddings that uses a two-stage training approach involving supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning to outperform discriminative embeddings across various multimodal tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了UME-R1，一种新型生成式多模态嵌入框架，它采用包括监督微调和强化学习在内的两阶段训练方法，在各种多模态任务中优于判别式嵌入。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）的显著成功推动了多模态嵌入的发展，但现有模型本质上仍具有判别性，限制了它们从推理驱动的生成范式中获益的能力。在这项工作中，我们率先探索生成式嵌入，将嵌入任务统一到生成范式中。我们提出了 UME-R1，一个通用的多模态嵌入框架，包含一个两阶段训练策略：冷启动监督微调赋予模型推理能力，使其能够生成判别式和生成式嵌入；随后通过强化学习增强推理并进一步优化生成式嵌入质量。这项开创性工作揭示了四个关键见解：1) 通过利用 MLLM 强大的生成式推理能力，生成式嵌入相比传统的判别式嵌入，显著提升了性能；2) 判别式嵌入和生成式嵌入是互补的，它们的组合oracle性能远远超过任一单独性能；3) 强化学习可以有效地增强生成式嵌入，建立一个可扩展的优化范式; 4) 推理时重复采样可以提高下游任务覆盖率 (pass@k)，突出显示了生成式嵌入的推理时可扩展性潜力。在涵盖视频、图像和可视文档的 78 个任务的 MMEB-V2 基准测试中进行的评估表明，UME-R1 显著优于传统的判别式嵌入模型，并为更具可解释性、推理驱动的生成式多模态嵌入提供了基础。我们的代码、模型和数据集将在 https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/UME-R1 公开提供。

title: Consistently Simulating Human Personas with Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to simulate human users in interactive settings such as therapy, education, and social role-play. While these simulations enable scalable training and evaluation of AI agents, off-the-shelf LLMs often drift from their assigned personas, contradict earlier statements, or abandon role-appropriate behavior. We introduce a unified framework for evaluating and improving persona consistency in LLM-generated dialogue. We define three automatic metrics: prompt-to-line consistency, line-to-line consistency, and Q&A consistency, that capture different types of persona drift and validate each against human annotations. Using these metrics as reward signals, we apply multi-turn reinforcement learning to fine-tune LLMs for three user roles: a patient, a student, and a social chat partner. Our method reduces inconsistency by over 55%, resulting in more coherent and faithful simulated users.
tldr: This paper introduces a reinforcement learning framework to improve the persona consistency of LLMs used for simulating human users in interactive settings, addressing the common issue of persona drift.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个强化学习框架，用于提高LLM在交互环境中模拟人类用户时的人格一致性，解决了常见的人格漂移问题。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在诸如治疗、教育和社会角色扮演等交互式环境中，越来越多地被用于模拟人类用户。尽管这些模拟能够实现AI代理的可扩展训练和评估，但开箱即用的LLM常常偏离其设定的角色，与其先前的陈述相矛盾，或放弃符合角色行为的举止。我们引入了一个统一的框架，用于评估和提升LLM生成对话中的角色一致性。我们定义了三个自动指标：提示词到语句一致性、语句到语句一致性和问答一致性，它们捕捉了不同类型的角色漂移，并针对人工标注进行了验证。我们利用这些指标作为奖励信号，应用多轮强化学习来微调LLM，使其适应三种用户角色：患者、学生和社交聊天伙伴。我们的方法将不一致性降低了超过55%，从而产生了更加连贯和忠于角色的模拟用户。

title: ID-Crafter: VLM-Grounded Online RL for Compositional Multi-Subject Video Generation
summary: Significant progress has been achieved in high-fidelity video synthesis, yet current paradigms often fall short in effectively integrating identity information from multiple subjects. This leads to semantic conflicts and suboptimal performance in preserving identities and interactions, limiting controllability and applicability. To tackle this issue, we introduce ID-Crafter, a framework for multi-subject video generation that achieves superior identity preservation and semantic coherence. ID-Crafter integrates three key components: (i) a hierarchical identity-preserving attention mechanism that progressively aggregates features at intra-subject, inter-subject, and cross-modal levels; (ii) a semantic understanding module powered by a pretrained Vision-Language Model (VLM) to provide fine-grained guidance and capture complex inter-subject relationships; and (iii) an online reinforcement learning phase to further refine the model for critical concepts. Furthermore, we construct a new dataset to facilitate robust training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ID-Crafter establishes new state-of-the-art performance on multi-subject video generation benchmarks, excelling in identity preservation, temporal consistency, and overall video quality. Project page: https://angericky.github.io/ID-Crafter
tldr: The paper introduces ID-Crafter, a framework employing VLM-grounded online RL for multi-subject video generation, addressing the challenge of maintaining identity and coherence when synthesizing videos of multiple people interacting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ID-Crafter，一个利用VLM和在线强化学习进行多主体视频生成的框架，旨在解决合成多个人物互动视频时保持身份和连贯性的挑战。
summary_zh: 高保真视频合成领域已取得显著进展，但当前范式在有效整合来自多个主体的身份信息方面常常表现不足。这导致语义冲突，并在保持身份和交互方面产生次优性能，从而限制了可控性和适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了ID-Crafter，一个用于多主体视频生成的框架，它实现了卓越的身份保持和语义一致性。ID-Crafter集成了三个关键组件：（i）一种分层身份保持注意力机制，它在主体内、主体间和跨模态级别逐步聚合特征；（ii）一个由预训练视觉-语言模型(VLM)驱动的语义理解模块，以提供细粒度的指导并捕获复杂的主体间关系；（iii）一个在线强化学习阶段，以进一步优化模型，使其适应关键概念。此外，我们构建了一个新的数据集，以促进稳健的训练和评估。大量实验表明，ID-Crafter在多主体视频生成基准测试中建立了新的当前最优性能，在身份保持、时间一致性和整体视频质量方面表现出色。项目主页：https://angericky.github.io/ID-Crafter

title: VinciCoder: Unifying Multimodal Code Generation via Coarse-to-fine Visual Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multimodal code generation has garnered significant interest within the research community. Despite the notable success of recent vision-language models (VLMs) on specialized tasks like chart-to-code generation, their reliance on single-task training regimens fosters a narrow paradigm that hinders the development of generalized \textbf{VI}sio\textbf{N} \textbf{C}ode \textbf{I}ntelligence. In this work, we introduce \textbf{VinciCoder}, a unified multimodal code generation model that addresses this limitation via a two-stage training framework. We begin by constructing a large-scale Supervised Finetuning (SFT) corpus comprising 1.6M image-code pairs for tasks involving direct code generation and visual-based code refinement. Subsequently, we introduce a Visual Reinforcement Learning (ViRL) strategy, which employs a coarse-to-fine reward mechanism to improve visual fidelity by calculating visual similarity across local and global image patches. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal code generation benchmarks demonstrate that VinciCoder achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing recent open-source models. The ablation study further validates the effectiveness of our proposed coarse-to-fine ViRL strategy. The data, code and model is available at https://github.com/DocTron-hub/VinciCoder.
tldr: VinciCoder is a unified multimodal code generation model trained using a large-scale image-code pairs corpus and a novel coarse-to-fine visual reinforcement learning strategy, achieving state-of-the-art performance on diverse benchmarks.
tldr_zh: VinciCoder是一个统一的多模态代码生成模型，它使用大规模的图像-代码对语料库和一个新颖的由粗到细的视觉强化学习策略进行训练，并在各种基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 多模态代码生成已引起研究界的广泛关注。 尽管最近的视觉-语言模型（VLM）在图表-代码生成等专门任务上取得了显著成功，但它们对单任务训练模式的依赖助长了一种狭隘的范式，阻碍了通用\textbf{视}觉\textbf{编}码\textbf{智}能的发展。 在这项工作中，我们引入了\textbf{VinciCoder}，一个统一的多模态代码生成模型，通过两阶段训练框架来解决这一局限性。我们首先构建了一个大规模的监督式微调（SFT）语料库，包含160万个图像-代码对，用于涉及直接代码生成和基于视觉的代码改进的任务。随后，我们引入了一种视觉强化学习（ViRL）策略，该策略采用粗到精的奖励机制，通过计算局部和全局图像块上的视觉相似性来提高视觉保真度。在各种多模态代码生成基准上的大量实验表明，VinciCoder实现了最先进的性能，超越了最近的开源模型。消融研究进一步验证了我们提出的粗到精ViRL策略的有效性。数据、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/DocTron-hub/VinciCoder 获取。

title: Object-Aware 4D Human Motion Generation
summary: Recent advances in video diffusion models have enabled the generation of high-quality videos. However, these videos still suffer from unrealistic deformations, semantic violations, and physical inconsistencies that are largely rooted in the absence of 3D physical priors. To address these challenges, we propose an object-aware 4D human motion generation framework grounded in 3D Gaussian representations and motion diffusion priors. With pre-generated 3D humans and objects, our method, Motion Score Distilled Interaction (MSDI), employs the spatial and prompt semantic information in large language models (LLMs) and motion priors through the proposed Motion Diffusion Score Distillation Sampling (MSDS). The combination of MSDS and LLMs enables our spatial-aware motion optimization, which distills score gradients from pre-trained motion diffusion models, to refine human motion while respecting object and semantic constraints. Unlike prior methods requiring joint training on limited interaction datasets, our zero-shot approach avoids retraining and generalizes to out-of-distribution object aware human motions. Experiments demonstrate that our framework produces natural and physically plausible human motions that respect 3D spatial context, offering a scalable solution for realistic 4D generation.
tldr: The paper introduces a zero-shot object-aware 4D human motion generation framework leveraging 3D Gaussian representations, motion diffusion priors, and large language models for realistic and physically plausible human motions interacting with objects.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个零样本的、能感知物体的4D人体运动生成框架，该框架利用3D高斯表示、运动扩散先验和大语言模型，从而生成与物体交互的、逼真且符合物理规则的人体运动。
summary_zh: 视频扩散模型的最新进展已经实现了高质量视频的生成。然而，这些视频仍然存在不真实的变形、语义违背和物理不一致性，这些问题在很大程度上源于缺乏3D物理先验。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于3D高斯表示和运动扩散先验的、感知对象的4D人体运动生成框架。通过预生成的3D人和对象，我们的方法，即运动分数提炼交互(MSDI)，利用大型语言模型(LLMs)中的空间和提示语义信息，并通过我们提出的运动扩散分数提炼采样(MSDS)来实现运动先验。MSDS和LLMs的结合使我们能够进行空间感知运动优化，该优化从预训练的运动扩散模型中提炼分数梯度，以在尊重对象和语义约束的同时改进人体运动。与需要在有限的交互数据集上进行联合训练的先前方法不同，我们的零样本方法避免了重新训练，并可推广到超出分布的对象感知人体运动。实验表明，我们的框架能够生成自然且物理上合理的人体运动，同时尊重3D空间上下文，为真实的4D生成提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

title: CompAgent: An Agentic Framework for Visual Compliance Verification
summary: Visual compliance verification is a critical yet underexplored problem in computer vision, especially in domains such as media, entertainment, and advertising where content must adhere to complex and evolving policy rules. Existing methods often rely on task-specific deep learning models trained on manually labeled datasets, which are costly to build and limited in generalizability. While recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer broad real-world knowledge and policy understanding, they struggle to reason over fine-grained visual details and apply structured compliance rules effectively on their own. In this paper, we propose CompAgent, the first agentic framework for visual compliance verification. CompAgent augments MLLMs with a suite of visual tools-such as object detectors, face analyzers, NSFW detectors, and captioning models-and introduces a planning agent that dynamically selects appropriate tools based on the compliance policy. A compliance verification agent then integrates image, tool outputs, and policy context to perform multimodal reasoning. Experiments on public benchmarks show that CompAgent outperforms specialized classifiers, direct MLLM prompting, and curated routing baselines, achieving up to 76% F1 score and a 10% improvement over the state-of-the-art on the UnsafeBench dataset. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of agentic planning and robust tool-augmented reasoning for scalable, accurate, and adaptable visual compliance verification.
tldr: The paper introduces CompAgent, an agentic framework that combines MLLMs with visual tools and a planning agent for improved visual compliance verification, outperforming existing methods on public benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CompAgent，一个代理框架，它将MLLM与视觉工具和规划代理相结合，以改进视觉合规性验证，并在公共基准测试中优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 视觉合规性验证是计算机视觉中一个至关重要但尚未充分探索的问题，尤其是在媒体、娱乐和广告等领域，这些领域的内容必须遵守复杂且不断演变的政策规则。现有方法通常依赖于在人工标注数据集上训练的特定于任务的深度学习模型，这些模型构建成本高昂且泛化能力有限。虽然最近的多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）提供了广泛的现实世界知识和政策理解，但它们难以推理细粒度的视觉细节，并且难以独自有效地应用结构化的合规性规则。在本文中，我们提出了 CompAgent，这是第一个用于视觉合规性验证的代理框架。CompAgent 利用一套视觉工具（如对象检测器、面部分析器、NSFW 检测器和图像描述模型）增强了MLLM，并引入了一个规划代理，该代理根据合规性政策动态地选择合适的工具。然后，合规性验证代理集成图像、工具输出和策略上下文，以执行多模态推理。在公共基准测试上的实验表明，CompAgent 优于专门的分类器、直接的 MLLM 提示和策划的路由基线，在 UnsafeBench 数据集上实现了高达 76% 的 F1 分数，并且比最先进技术提高了 10%。我们的结果证明了代理式规划和稳健的工具增强推理对于可扩展、准确和适应性强的视觉合规性验证的有效性。

title: Tree Training: Accelerating Agentic LLMs Training via Shared Prefix Reuse
summary: Agentic large language model (LLM) training often involves multi-turn interaction trajectories that branch into multiple execution paths due to concurrent tool use, think-mode, sub-agent, context management and other runtime designs. As a result, the token produced by a single task naturally forms a tree-structured token trajectory with shared prefixes, rather than a linear sequence. Existing training pipelines linearize such trajectories and treat each branch independently, leading to substantial redundant computation in both forward and backward passes. To eliminate such redundancy, we introduce Tree Training, an efficient training framework for tree-structured trajectories. Its core component, Gradient Restoration, enables correct gradient aggregation across shared prefixes, allowing each prefix to be computed exactly once while remaining mathematically equivalent to independent training on all branches. To support large trajectory trees in practice, we redesign the training engine to natively ingest tree-structured data and propose Tree Packing, a memory-efficient partitioning strategy that preserves high prefix reuse. Experiments conducted on dense and MOE models of real-world agentic trajectories show 6.2x training speedup for both supervised fine-tuning and the model update phase in reinforcement learning.
tldr: This paper introduces Tree Training, a novel framework for accelerating agentic LLM training by reusing shared prefixes in tree-structured interaction trajectories, achieving significant speedups. It addresses the redundancy in existing methods that linearize trajectory trees.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Tree Training，一种通过重用树状交互轨迹中的共享前缀来加速Agentic LLM训练的新框架，实现了显著的加速。 它解决了现有方法中线性化轨迹树造成的冗余。
summary_zh: 基于代理的大型语言模型（LLM）训练通常涉及多轮交互轨迹，由于并发工具使用、思考模式、子代理、上下文管理和其他运行时设计，这些轨迹会分支成多个执行路径。因此，由单个任务产生的令牌自然形成具有共享前缀的树形结构令牌轨迹，而不是线性序列。现有的训练流程将此类轨迹线性化并独立处理每个分支，导致前向和反向传播中产生大量冗余计算。为了消除这种冗余，我们引入了树训练，这是一种用于树形结构轨迹的有效训练框架。其核心组件——梯度恢复，实现了跨共享前缀的正确梯度聚合，允许每个前缀只计算一次，同时保持与独立训练所有分支在数学上的等价性。为了在实践中支持大型轨迹树，我们重新设计了训练Engine，使其能够原生摄取树形结构数据，并提出了树打包，这是一种内存高效的分区策略，可保留高的前缀重用率。在真实世界代理轨迹的密集模型和MOE模型上进行的实验表明，监督微调和强化学习中的模型更新阶段均实现了6.2倍的训练加速。

title: Adaptive and Multi-object Grasping via Deformable Origami Modules
summary: Soft robotics gripper have shown great promise in handling fragile and geometrically complex objects. However, most existing solutions rely on bulky actuators, complex control strategies, or advanced tactile sensing to achieve stable and reliable grasping performance. In this work, we present a multi-finger hybrid gripper featuring passively deformable origami modules that generate constant force and torque output. Each finger composed of parallel origami modules is driven by a 1-DoF actuator mechanism, enabling passive shape adaptability and stable grasping force without active sensing or feedback control. More importantly, we demonstrate an interesting capability in simultaneous multi-object grasping, which allows stacked objects of varied shape and size to be picked, transported and placed independently at different states, significantly improving manipulation efficiency compared to single-object grasping. These results highlight the potential of origami-based compliant structures as scalable modules for adaptive, stable and efficient multi-object manipulation in domestic and industrial pick-and-place scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-finger gripper utilizing passively deformable origami modules for adaptive and stable single and multi-object grasping, demonstrating increased manipulation efficiency without complex control strategies.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种多指夹爪，它利用被动变形的折纸模块来实现自适应和稳定的单物体和多物体抓取，展示了在无需复杂控制策略的情况下提高操作效率。
summary_zh: 软体机器人夹爪在处理易碎和几何形状复杂的物体方面展现出巨大的潜力。然而，现有的大多数解决方案依赖于笨重的执行器、复杂的控制策略或先进的触觉传感来实现稳定可靠的抓取性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多指混合夹爪，其特点是具有被动变形的折纸模块，可以产生恒定的力矩输出。每根由平行折纸模块组成的手指由一个1自由度执行器机构驱动，无需主动传感或反馈控制即可实现被动的形状适应性和稳定的抓取力。更重要的是，我们展示了一种有趣的同时抓取多物体能力，该能力允许将堆叠的、形状和尺寸各异的物体独立地拾取、运输和放置到不同的状态，相比于单物体抓取，显著提高了操作效率。这些结果突出了基于折纸的柔顺结构作为可扩展模块的潜力，使其可以在家庭和工业拾取放置场景中实现自适应、稳定和高效的多物体操作。

title: Descriptive Model-based Learning and Control for Bipedal Locomotion
summary: Bipedal balance is challenging due to its multi-phase, hybrid nature and high-dimensional state space. Traditional balance control approaches for bipedal robots rely on low-dimensional models for locomotion planning and reactive control, constraining the full robot to behave like these simplified models. This involves tracking preset reference paths for the Center of Mass and upper body obtained through low-dimensional models, often resulting in inefficient walking patterns with bent knees. However, we observe that bipedal balance is inherently low-dimensional and can be effectively described with simple state and action descriptors in a low-dimensional state space. This allows the robot's motion to evolve freely in its high-dimensional state space, only constraining its projection in the low-dimensional state space. In this work, we propose a novel control approach that avoids prescribing a low-dimensional model to the full model. Instead, our control framework uses a descriptive model with the minimum degrees of freedom necessary to maintain balance, allowing the remaining degrees of freedom to evolve freely in the high-dimensional space. This results in an efficient human-like walking gait and improved robustness.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel control framework for bipedal robots that uses a descriptive, low-dimensional model to maintain balance while allowing the robot's high-dimensional degrees of freedom to move freely, resulting in more efficient and human-like walking.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的双足机器人控制框架，它使用描述性的低维模型来维持平衡，同时允许机器人高维自由度自由移动，从而实现更高效、更像人类的行走。
summary_zh: 二足行走平衡由于其多阶段、混合性质和高维状态空间而极具挑战性。传统的二足机器人平衡控制方法依赖于低维模型进行运动规划和反应控制，迫使整个机器人表现得像这些简化模型一样。这涉及到跟踪通过低维模型获得的质心和上半身的预设参考路径，通常导致效率低下的屈膝行走模式。然而，我们观察到二足行走平衡本质上是低维的，并且可以用低维状态空间中的简单状态和动作描述符有效地描述。这使得机器人的运动可以在其高维状态空间中自由演化，仅约束其在低维状态空间中的投影。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的控制方法，避免将低维模型强加于完整模型。相反，我们的控制框架使用一个描述性模型，它具有维持平衡所需的最小自由度，允许剩余的自由度在高维空间中自由演化。这产生了高效的类人行走步态并提高了鲁棒性。

title: OmniTrack++: Omnidirectional Multi-Object Tracking by Learning Large-FoV Trajectory Feedback
summary: This paper investigates Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) in panoramic imagery, which introduces unique challenges including a 360° Field of View (FoV), resolution dilution, and severe view-dependent distortions. Conventional MOT methods designed for narrow-FoV pinhole cameras generalize unsatisfactorily under these conditions. To address panoramic distortion, large search space, and identity ambiguity under a 360° FoV, OmniTrack++ adopts a feedback-driven framework that progressively refines perception with trajectory cues. A DynamicSSM block first stabilizes panoramic features, implicitly alleviating geometric distortion. On top of normalized representations, FlexiTrack Instances use trajectory-informed feedback for flexible localization and reliable short-term association. To ensure long-term robustness, an ExpertTrack Memory consolidates appearance cues via a Mixture-of-Experts design, enabling recovery from fragmented tracks and reducing identity drift. Finally, a Tracklet Management module adaptively switches between end-to-end and tracking-by-detection modes according to scene dynamics, offering a balanced and scalable solution for panoramic MOT. To support rigorous evaluation, we establish the EmboTrack benchmark, a comprehensive dataset for panoramic MOT that includes QuadTrack, captured with a quadruped robot, and BipTrack, collected with a bipedal wheel-legged robot. Together, these datasets span wide-angle environments and diverse motion patterns, providing a challenging testbed for real-world panoramic perception. Extensive experiments on JRDB and EmboTrack demonstrate that OmniTrack++ achieves state-of-the-art performance, yielding substantial HOTA improvements of +25.5% on JRDB and +43.07% on QuadTrack over the original OmniTrack. Datasets and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/xifen523/OmniTrack.
tldr: The paper introduces OmniTrack++, a novel multi-object tracking method for panoramic imagery, addressing challenges like distortion and ambiguity in wide field-of-view settings. It also presents a new challenging dataset, EmboTrack, for evaluating panoramic MOT.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OmniTrack++，一种用于全景图像的新型多目标跟踪方法，解决了宽视野设置中的失真和歧义等挑战。 它还提出了一个新的具有挑战性的全景MOT评估数据集EmboTrack。
summary_zh: 本文研究全景图像中的多目标跟踪(MOT)，这引入了独特的挑战，包括360°视场(FoV)、分辨率稀释和严重的视角相关畸变。为窄视场针孔相机设计的传统MOT方法在这些条件下表现不佳。为了解决全景畸变、大搜索空间以及360°视场下的身份模糊问题，OmniTrack++采用了一种反馈驱动框架，通过轨迹线索逐步改进感知。DynamicSSM块首先稳定全景特征，隐式地减轻几何畸变。在归一化表示的基础上，FlexiTrack Instances利用轨迹信息反馈进行灵活的定位和可靠的短期关联。为了确保长期鲁棒性，ExpertTrack Memory通过混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts）设计整合外观线索，从而能够从碎片化的轨迹中恢复并减少身份漂移。最后，Tracklet Management模块根据场景的动态自适应地在端到端模式和基于检测的跟踪模式之间切换，为全景MOT提供了一种平衡且可扩展的解决方案。为了支持严格的评估，我们建立了EmboTrack基准，这是一个用于全景MOT的综合数据集，包括用四足机器人捕获的QuadTrack和用双足轮腿式机器人收集的BipTrack。这些数据集涵盖了广角环境和各种运动模式，为真实世界全景感知提供了一个具有挑战性的测试平台。在JRDB和EmboTrack上的大量实验表明，OmniTrack++实现了最先进的性能，相对于原始OmniTrack在JRDB上产生了+25.5%的HOTA显著提升，在QuadTrack上产生了+43.07%的显著提升。数据集和代码将在https://github.com/xifen523/OmniTrack上公开提供。

title: EgoMI: Learning Active Vision and Whole-Body Manipulation from Egocentric Human Demonstrations
summary: Imitation learning from human demonstrations offers a promising approach for robot skill acquisition, but egocentric human data introduces fundamental challenges due to the embodiment gap. During manipulation, humans actively coordinate head and hand movements, continuously reposition their viewpoint and use pre-action visual fixation search strategies to locate relevant objects. These behaviors create dynamic, task-driven head motions that static robot sensing systems cannot replicate, leading to a significant distribution shift that degrades policy performance. We present EgoMI (Egocentric Manipulation Interface), a framework that captures synchronized end-effector and active head trajectories during manipulation tasks, resulting in data that can be retargeted to compatible semi-humanoid robot embodiments. To handle rapid and wide-spanning head viewpoint changes, we introduce a memory-augmented policy that selectively incorporates historical observations. We evaluate our approach on a bimanual robot equipped with an actuated camera head and find that policies with explicit head-motion modeling consistently outperform baseline methods. Results suggest that coordinated hand-eye learning with EgoMI effectively bridges the human-robot embodiment gap for robust imitation learning on semi-humanoid embodiments. Project page: https://egocentric-manipulation-interface.github.io
tldr: The paper introduces EgoMI, a framework for imitation learning of robotic manipulation skills from egocentric human demonstrations, addressing the embodiment gap through synchronized end-effector and active head trajectories and a memory-augmented policy for handling viewpoint changes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EgoMI，一个模仿学习的框架，用于从以自我为中心的人类演示中学习机器人操作技能，通过同步末端执行器和主动头部轨迹以及用于处理视点变化的记忆增强策略来解决具身差距。
summary_zh: 模仿学习通过人类演示为机器人技能获取提供了一种有前景的方法，但以自我为中心的人类数据由于具身认知差距带来了根本性的挑战。在操作过程中，人类积极协调头部和手部运动，不断调整他们的视角，并使用预先操作的视觉注视搜索策略来定位相关物体。这些行为产生了动态的、任务驱动的头部运动，这是静态机器人感知系统无法复制的，从而导致了显著的分布偏移，降低了策略性能。我们提出了EgoMI（以自我为中心的操作界面），一个框架，它在操作任务期间捕获同步的末端执行器和主动头部轨迹，从而产生可以重定向到兼容的半人形机器人姿态上的数据。为了处理快速且大范围的头部视角变化，我们引入了一种记忆增强策略，该策略选择性地结合了历史观测。我们在一个配备了致动相机头的双臂机器人上评估了我们的方法，发现具有显式头部运动建模的策略始终优于基线方法。结果表明，使用EgoMI进行的手眼协调学习可以有效地弥合人类-机器人具身认知差距，从而在半人形姿态上实现鲁棒的模仿学习。项目页面：https://egocentric-manipulation-interface.github.io

title: Robust Single-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Regional Traffic Signal Control Under Demand Fluctuations
summary: Traffic congestion, primarily driven by intersection queuing, significantly impacts urban living standards, safety, environmental quality, and economic efficiency. While Traffic Signal Control (TSC) systems hold potential for congestion mitigation, traditional optimization models often fail to capture real-world traffic complexity and dynamics. This study introduces a novel single-agent reinforcement learning (RL) framework for regional adaptive TSC, circumventing the coordination complexities inherent in multi-agent systems through a centralized decision-making paradigm. The model employs an adjacency matrix to unify the encoding of road network topology, real-time queue states derived from probe vehicle data, and current signal timing parameters. Leveraging the efficient learning capabilities of the DreamerV3 world model, the agent learns control policies where actions sequentially select intersections and adjust their signal phase splits to regulate traffic inflow/outflow, analogous to a feedback control system. Reward design prioritizes queue dissipation, directly linking congestion metrics (queue length) to control actions. Simulation experiments conducted in SUMO demonstrate the model's effectiveness: under inference scenarios with multi-level (10%, 20%, 30%) Origin-Destination (OD) demand fluctuations, the framework exhibits robust anti-fluctuation capability and significantly reduces queue lengths. This work establishes a new paradigm for intelligent traffic control compatible with probe vehicle technology. Future research will focus on enhancing practical applicability by incorporating stochastic OD demand fluctuations during training and exploring regional optimization mechanisms for contingency events.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel single-agent RL framework using DreamerV3 for regional traffic signal control, demonstrating robustness against demand fluctuations in SUMO simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的单智能体强化学习框架，使用DreamerV3进行区域交通信号控制，并在SUMO仿真中展示了其对需求波动的鲁棒性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
交通拥堵，主要由交叉口排队引起，严重影响城市生活水平、安全性、环境质量和经济效率。交通信号控制(TSC)系统具有缓解拥堵的潜力，但传统的优化模型通常无法捕捉现实世界交通的复杂性和动态性。本研究提出了一种用于区域自适应TSC的新型单智能体强化学习(RL)框架，通过集中式决策模式规避了多智能体系统中固有的协调复杂性。该模型采用邻接矩阵统一编码道路网络拓扑、来自探测车数据的实时排队状态以及当前的信号配时参数。利用DreamerV3世界模型的高效学习能力，智能体学习控制策略，其中动作顺序选择交叉口并调整其信号相位分割，以调节交通流入/流出，类似于反馈控制系统。奖励设计优先考虑队列消散，将拥堵指标（队列长度）直接与控制动作相关联。在SUMO中进行的仿真实验证明了该模型的有效性：在具有多级（10%、20%、30%）起点-终点(OD)需求波动的推理场景下，该框架表现出强大的抗波动能力，并显著减少了队列长度。这项工作建立了一种与探测车技术兼容的智能交通控制新范例。未来的研究将侧重于通过在训练期间纳入随机OD需求波动以及探索针对突发事件的区域优化机制来增强实际应用性。

title: Who Can We Trust? Scope-Aware Video Moment Retrieval with Multi-Agent Conflict
summary: Video moment retrieval uses a text query to locate a moment from a given untrimmed video reference. Locating corresponding video moments with text queries helps people interact with videos efficiently. Current solutions for this task have not considered conflict within location results from different models, so various models cannot integrate correctly to produce better results. This study introduces a reinforcement learning-based video moment retrieval model that can scan the whole video once to find the moment's boundary while producing its locational evidence. Moreover, we proposed a multi-agent system framework that can use evidential learning to resolve conflicts between agents' localization output. As a side product of observing and dealing with conflicts between agents, we can decide whether a query has no corresponding moment in a video (out-of-scope) without additional training, which is suitable for real-world applications. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show the effectiveness of our proposed methods compared with state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, the results of our study reveal that modeling competition and conflict of the multi-agent system is an effective way to improve RL performance in moment retrieval and show the new role of evidential learning in the multi-agent framework.
tldr: This paper introduces a reinforcement learning-based video moment retrieval model with a multi-agent system that resolves conflicting localization outputs using evidential learning and detects out-of-scope queries without extra training.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于强化学习的视频片段检索模型，该模型采用多智能体系统，利用证据学习解决冲突的定位输出，并在无需额外训练的情况下检测超出范围的查询。
summary_zh: 视频片段检索使用文本查询来定位给定未分割视频参考中的一个片段。使用文本查询定位相应的视频片段有助于人们高效地与视频交互。目前针对此任务的解决方案尚未考虑来自不同模型的定位结果之间的冲突，因此各种模型无法正确集成以产生更好的结果。本研究介绍了一种基于强化学习的视频片段检索模型，该模型可以扫描整个视频一次，并在产生其定位证据的同时找到片段的边界。此外，我们提出了一种多智能体系统框架，该框架可以使用证据学习来解决智能体定位输出之间的冲突。作为观察和处理智能体之间冲突的副产品，我们无需额外训练即可判断某个查询在视频中是否没有对应的片段（超出范围），这适用于实际应用。在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法是有效的。此外，我们的研究结果表明，建模多智能体系统的竞争和冲突是提高片段检索中强化学习性能的有效途径，并展示了证据学习在多智能体框架中的新作用。

title: Oitijjo-3D: Generative AI Framework for Rapid 3D Heritage Reconstruction from Street View Imagery
summary: Cultural heritage restoration in Bangladesh faces a dual challenge of limited resources and scarce technical expertise. Traditional 3D digitization methods, such as photogrammetry or LiDAR scanning, require expensive hardware, expert operators, and extensive on-site access, which are often infeasible in developing contexts. As a result, many of Bangladesh's architectural treasures, from the Paharpur Buddhist Monastery to Ahsan Manzil, remain vulnerable to decay and inaccessible in digital form. This paper introduces Oitijjo-3D, a cost-free generative AI framework that democratizes 3D cultural preservation. By using publicly available Google Street View imagery, Oitijjo-3D reconstructs faithful 3D models of heritage structures through a two-stage pipeline - multimodal visual reasoning with Gemini 2.5 Flash Image for structure-texture synthesis, and neural image-to-3D generation through Hexagen for geometry recovery. The system produces photorealistic, metrically coherent reconstructions in seconds, achieving significant speedups compared to conventional Structure-from-Motion pipelines, without requiring any specialized hardware or expert supervision. Experiments on landmarks such as Ahsan Manzil, Choto Sona Mosque, and Paharpur demonstrate that Oitijjo-3D preserves both visual and structural fidelity while drastically lowering economic and technical barriers. By turning open imagery into digital heritage, this work reframes preservation as a community-driven, AI-assisted act of cultural continuity for resource-limited nations.
tldr: Oitijjo-3D is a generative AI framework that uses Google Street View imagery to reconstruct 3D models of cultural heritage sites, addressing resource limitations in digitizing and preserving architectural treasures in developing countries.
tldr_zh: Oitijjo-3D是一个生成式AI框架，利用谷歌街景图像重建文化遗产遗址的3D模型，旨在解决发展中国家在数字化和保护建筑珍品方面的资源限制。
summary_zh: 在孟加拉国，文化遗产修复面临资源有限和技术专长匮乏的双重挑战。 传统的3D数字化方法，如摄影测量或激光雷达扫描，需要昂贵的硬件、专业的操作人员以及广泛的现场访问，这在发展背景下通常是不可行的。 因此，孟加拉国的许多建筑瑰宝，从帕哈尔普尔佛教寺院到阿赫桑曼济勒，仍然容易受到损毁并且无法以数字形式获取。 本文介绍了一种免费的生成式人工智能框架Oitijjo-3D，该框架旨在实现3D文化保护的普及化。 通过使用公开可用的谷歌街景图像，Oitijjo-3D通过一个两阶段流程重建遗产结构的逼真3D模型：使用Gemini 2.5 Flash Image进行多模态视觉推理，以进行结构-纹理合成；以及通过Hexagen进行神经图像到3D生成，以进行几何重建。 该系统在几秒钟内即可生成照片般逼真、在度量上一致的重建，与传统的运动结构恢复（Structure-from-Motion）流程相比，实现了显著的加速，而无需任何专门的硬件或专家监督。 在阿赫桑曼济勒、小索纳清真寺和帕哈尔普尔等标志性建筑上的实验表明，Oitijjo-3D在大幅降低经济和技术门槛的同时，保留了视觉和结构上的保真度。 通过将开放图像转化为数字遗产，这项工作将保护重新定义为一种由社区驱动、人工智能辅助的文化连续性行为，从而服务于资源有限的国家。

title: EvoMem: Improving Multi-Agent Planning with Dual-Evolving Memory
summary: Planning has been a cornerstone of artificial intelligence for solving complex problems, and recent progress in LLM-based multi-agent frameworks have begun to extend this capability. However, the role of human-like memory within these frameworks remains largely unexplored. Understanding how agents coordinate through memory is critical for natural language planning, where iterative reasoning, constraint tracking, and error correction drive the success. Inspired by working memory model in cognitive psychology, we present EvoMem, a multi-agent framework built on a dual-evolving memory mechanism. The framework consists of three agents (Constraint Extractor, Verifier, and Actor) and two memory modules: Constraint Memory (CMem), which evolves across queries by storing task-specific rules and constraints while remains fixed within a query, and Query-feedback Memory (QMem), which evolves within a query by accumulating feedback across iterations for solution refinement. Both memory modules are reset at the end of each query session. Evaluations on trip planning, meeting planning, and calendar scheduling show consistent performance improvements, highlighting the effectiveness of EvoMem. This success underscores the importance of memory in enhancing multi-agent planning.
tldr: The paper introduces EvoMem, a multi-agent planning framework with a dual-evolving memory mechanism (Constraint Memory and Query-feedback Memory) inspired by cognitive psychology, showing performance improvements in several planning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EvoMem，一个具有双重演化记忆机制（约束记忆和查询反馈记忆）的多智能体规划框架，其灵感来自认知心理学，并在几个规划任务中表现出性能提升。
summary_zh: 规划一直是人工智能解决复杂问题的基石，而基于大型语言模型的多智能体框架的最新进展已开始扩展这一能力。然而，类人记忆在这些框架中的作用在很大程度上仍未被探索。理解智能体如何通过记忆进行协调对于自然语言规划至关重要，其中迭代推理、约束跟踪和错误纠正驱动着成功。受到认知心理学中工作记忆模型的启发，我们提出了EvoMem，一个构建于双重演化记忆机制之上的多智能体框架。该框架由三个智能体（约束提取器、验证器和执行者）和两个记忆模块组成：约束记忆（CMem），它通过存储任务特定规则和约束跨查询演化，但在单个查询内保持不变；以及查询反馈记忆（QMem），它通过累积跨迭代的反馈以进行解决方案细化在单个查询内演化。这两个记忆模块均在每个查询会话结束时重置。在旅行计划、会议计划和日历安排上的评估表明，性能持续提高，突显了EvoMem的有效性。这一成功强调了记忆在增强多智能体规划中的重要性。

title: Grounding Surgical Action Triplets with Instrument Instance Segmentation: A Dataset and Target-Aware Fusion Approach
summary: Understanding surgical instrument-tissue interactions requires not only identifying which instrument performs which action on which anatomical target, but also grounding these interactions spatially within the surgical scene. Existing surgical action triplet recognition methods are limited to learning from frame-level classification, failing to reliably link actions to specific instrument instances.Previous attempts at spatial grounding have primarily relied on class activation maps, which lack the precision and robustness required for detailed instrument-tissue interaction analysis.To address this gap, we propose grounding surgical action triplets with instrument instance segmentation, or triplet segmentation for short, a new unified task which produces spatially grounded <instrument, verb, target> outputs.We start by presenting CholecTriplet-Seg, a large-scale dataset containing over 30,000 annotated frames, linking instrument instance masks with action verb and anatomical target annotations, and establishing the first benchmark for strongly supervised, instance-level triplet grounding and evaluation.To learn triplet segmentation, we propose TargetFusionNet, a novel architecture that extends Mask2Former with a target-aware fusion mechanism to address the challenge of accurate anatomical target prediction by fusing weak anatomy priors with instrument instance queries.Evaluated across recognition, detection, and triplet segmentation metrics, TargetFusionNet consistently improves performance over existing baselines, demonstrating that strong instance supervision combined with weak target priors significantly enhances the accuracy and robustness of surgical action understanding.Triplet segmentation establishes a unified framework for spatially grounding surgical action triplets. The proposed benchmark and architecture pave the way for more interpretable, surgical scene understanding.
tldr: This paper introduces a new task, dataset (CholecTriplet-Seg), and architecture (TargetFusionNet) for spatially grounding surgical action triplets, linking instrument instance masks with action verb and anatomical target annotations for improved surgical scene understanding.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一项新的任务，数据集（CholecTriplet-Seg）和一个新架构（TargetFusionNet），用于在空间上定位手术动作三元组，将器械实例掩码与动作动词和解剖目标注释链接起来，以改进手术场景理解。
summary_zh: 理解手术器械与组织间的相互作用不仅需要识别哪些器械对哪些解剖目标执行了哪些动作，还需要在手术场景中对这些相互作用进行空间定位。现有的手术动作三元组识别方法仅限于从帧级别的分类中学习，无法可靠地将动作与特定的器械实例联系起来。先前的空间定位尝试主要依赖于类激活图，但其精度和鲁棒性不足以进行详细的器械-组织相互作用分析。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出利用器械实例分割来定位手术动作三元组，简称三元组分割，这是一个新的统一任务，可生成空间定位的 <器械、动词、目标> 输出。我们首先介绍了 CholecTriplet-Seg，这是一个包含超过 30,000 个带注释帧的大规模数据集，将器械实例掩码与动作动词和解剖目标注释相关联，并为强监督、实例级三元组定位和评估建立第一个基准。为了学习三元组分割，我们提出了一种名为 TargetFusionNet 的新型架构，该架构通过目标感知融合机制扩展了 Mask2Former，通过将弱解剖先验知识与器械实例查询融合，解决了准确预测解剖目标的难题。在识别、检测和三元组分割的各项指标上进行评估，TargetFusionNet 一致地提高了相对于现有基线模型的性能，表明强大的实例监督与弱目标先验知识相结合可以显著提高手术动作理解的准确性和鲁棒性。三元组分割为空间定位手术动作三元组建立了一个统一的框架。提出的基准和架构为更具可解释性的手术场景理解铺平了道路。

title: Diff4Splat: Controllable 4D Scene Generation with Latent Dynamic Reconstruction Models
summary: We introduce Diff4Splat, a feed-forward method that synthesizes controllable and explicit 4D scenes from a single image. Our approach unifies the generative priors of video diffusion models with geometry and motion constraints learned from large-scale 4D datasets. Given a single input image, a camera trajectory, and an optional text prompt, Diff4Splat directly predicts a deformable 3D Gaussian field that encodes appearance, geometry, and motion, all in a single forward pass, without test-time optimization or post-hoc refinement. At the core of our framework lies a video latent transformer, which augments video diffusion models to jointly capture spatio-temporal dependencies and predict time-varying 3D Gaussian primitives. Training is guided by objectives on appearance fidelity, geometric accuracy, and motion consistency, enabling Diff4Splat to synthesize high-quality 4D scenes in 30 seconds. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Diff4Splatacross video generation, novel view synthesis, and geometry extraction, where it matches or surpasses optimization-based methods for dynamic scene synthesis while being significantly more efficient.
tldr: Diff4Splat is a feed-forward method synthesizing controllable 4D scenes from a single image using a video diffusion model and 3D Gaussian primitives, achieving fast and high-quality results.
tldr_zh: Diff4Splat是一种前馈方法，它使用视频扩散模型和3D高斯基元从单张图像合成可控的4D场景，从而实现快速和高质量的结果。
summary_zh: 我们提出了Diff4Splat，一种前馈方法，可从单张图像合成可控且显式的4D场景。我们的方法将视频扩散模型的生成先验与从大规模4D数据集学习到的几何和运动约束统一起来。给定一个单张输入图像、一个相机轨迹和一个可选的文本提示，Diff4Splat直接预测一个可变形的3D高斯场，该高斯场在一个前向传播中编码了外观、几何形状和运动，无需测试时优化或事后细化。我们框架的核心在于一个视频潜在Transformer，它增强了视频扩散模型，以共同捕获时空依赖性并预测随时间变化的3D高斯基元。训练受到外观保真度、几何精度和运动一致性目标的指导，使得Diff4Splat能够在30秒内合成高质量的4D场景。我们展示了Diff4Splat在视频生成、新视角合成和几何提取方面的有效性，在动态场景合成方面，它与基于优化的方法相媲美或更胜一筹，同时效率更高。

title: X-TRACK: Physics-Aware xLSTM for Realistic Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
summary: Recent advancements in Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) architectures, particularly the Extended Long Short Term Memory (xLSTM), have addressed the limitations of traditional Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) networks by introducing exponential gating and enhanced memory structures. These improvements make xLSTM suitable for time-series prediction tasks as they exhibit the ability to model long-term temporal dependencies better than LSTMs. Despite their potential, these xLSTM-based models remain largely unexplored in the context of vehicle trajectory prediction. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel xLSTM-based vehicle trajectory prediction framework, X-TRAJ, and its physics-aware variant, X-TRACK (eXtended LSTM for TRAjectory prediction Constraint by Kinematics), which explicitly integrates vehicle motion kinematics into the model learning process. By introducing physical constraints, the proposed model generates realistic and feasible trajectories. A comprehensive evaluation on the highD and NGSIM datasets demonstrates that X-TRACK outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces X-TRAJ and its physics-aware variant X-TRACK, which uses xLSTM to predict vehicle trajectories, incorporating vehicle motion kinematics for realistic predictions and outperforming state-of-the-art baselines on standard datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了X-TRAJ及其物理感知变体X-TRACK，它使用xLSTM来预测车辆轨迹，结合车辆运动学以实现逼真的预测，并在标准数据集上优于最先进的基线。
summary_zh: 近年来，循环神经网络（RNN）架构，特别是扩展长短期记忆网络（xLSTM），通过引入指数门控和增强的记忆结构，解决了传统长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的局限性。这些改进使xLSTM适用于时间序列预测任务，因为它们比LSTM更能建模长期时间依赖性。尽管具有潜力，但这些基于xLSTM的模型在车辆轨迹预测领域仍未得到充分探索。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的基于xLSTM的车辆轨迹预测框架X-TRAJ，以及其物理感知变体X-TRACK（运动学约束的轨迹预测扩展LSTM），该变体将车辆运动学显式地集成到模型学习过程中。通过引入物理约束，所提出的模型可以生成真实可行的轨迹。在highD和NGSIM数据集上的全面评估表明，X-TRACK的性能优于最先进的基线模型。

title: 4D Neural Voxel Splatting: Dynamic Scene Rendering with Voxelized Guassian Splatting
summary: Although 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) achieves efficient rendering for novel view synthesis, extending it to dynamic scenes still results in substantial memory overhead from replicating Gaussians across frames. To address this challenge, we propose 4D Neural Voxel Splatting (4D-NVS), which combines voxel-based representations with neural Gaussian splatting for efficient dynamic scene modeling. Instead of generating separate Gaussian sets per timestamp, our method employs a compact set of neural voxels with learned deformation fields to model temporal dynamics. The design greatly reduces memory consumption and accelerates training while preserving high image quality. We further introduce a novel view refinement stage that selectively improves challenging viewpoints through targeted optimization, maintaining global efficiency while enhancing rendering quality for difficult viewing angles. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches with significant memory reduction and faster training, enabling real-time rendering with superior visual fidelity.
tldr: This paper introduces 4D Neural Voxel Splatting (4D-NVS), a method that combines voxel-based representations with neural Gaussian splatting to efficiently model and render dynamic scenes, reducing memory consumption and accelerating training compared to existing 3D Gaussian Splatting extensions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为4D神经体素溅射（4D-NVS）的方法，该方法结合了基于体素的表示和神经高斯溅射，可以高效地建模和渲染动态场景，与现有的3D高斯溅射扩展相比，减少了内存消耗并加快了训练速度。
summary_zh:
摘要：
虽然3D高斯溅射(3D-GS)在 novel view synthesis 中实现了高效的渲染，但将其扩展到动态场景仍然会导致大量的内存开销，这是由于跨帧复制高斯分布所致。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 4D 神经体素溅射（4D-NVS），它结合了基于体素的表示和神经高斯溅射，以实现高效的动态场景建模。我们的方法不是为每个时间戳生成单独的高斯集合，而是采用一组紧凑的神经体素，并利用学习到的变形场来模拟时间动态。这种设计大大减少了内存消耗并加速了训练，同时保持了高质量的图像。我们进一步引入了一种新的视角优化阶段，通过有针对性的优化来选择性地改进具有挑战性的视点，在保持全局效率的同时，增强了困难视角下的渲染质量。实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，具有显著的内存减少和更快的训练速度，从而能够以卓越的视觉保真度进行实时渲染。

title: OSMGen: Highly Controllable Satellite Image Synthesis using OpenStreetMap Data
summary: Accurate and up-to-date geospatial data are essential for urban planning, infrastructure monitoring, and environmental management. Yet, automating urban monitoring remains difficult because curated datasets of specific urban features and their changes are scarce. We introduce OSMGen, a generative framework that creates realistic satellite imagery directly from raw OpenStreetMap (OSM) data. Unlike prior work that relies on raster tiles, OSMGen uses the full richness of OSM JSON, including vector geometries, semantic tags, location, and time, giving fine-grained control over how scenes are generated. A central feature of the framework is the ability to produce consistent before-after image pairs: user edits to OSM inputs translate into targeted visual changes, while the rest of the scene is preserved. This makes it possible to generate training data that addresses scarcity and class imbalance, and to give planners a simple way to preview proposed interventions by editing map data. More broadly, OSMGen produces paired (JSON, image) data for both static and changed states, paving the way toward a closed-loop system where satellite imagery can automatically drive structured OSM updates. Source code is available at https://github.com/amir-zsh/OSMGen.
tldr: The paper introduces OSMGen, a generative framework that creates realistic satellite imagery from OpenStreetMap (OSM) data, enabling controlled scene generation and before-after image pair creation for training data augmentation and urban planning previews.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为OSMGen的生成框架，它可以从OpenStreetMap（OSM）数据创建逼真的卫星图像，从而实现可控的场景生成和前后图像对的创建，用于训练数据增强和城市规划预览。
summary_zh: 准确且最新的地理空间数据对于城市规划、基础设施监控和环境管理至关重要。然而，由于缺乏特定的城市特征及其变化的高质量数据集，城市监控自动化仍然困难。我们介绍了一种生成式框架OSMGen，可以直接从原始OpenStreetMap (OSM) 数据创建逼真的卫星图像。与依赖栅格瓦片的先前工作不同，OSMGen利用OSM JSON的全部丰富性，包括矢量几何、语义标签、位置和时间，从而能够对场景生成进行精细控制。该框架的核心特性是能够产生一致的前-后图像对：用户对OSM输入的编辑会转化为有针对性的视觉变化，而场景的其余部分则保持不变。这使得生成训练数据以解决稀缺性和类别不平衡问题成为可能，并为规划人员提供了一种通过编辑地图数据来预览拟议干预措施的简单方法。更广泛地说，OSMGen生成静态和变化状态的配对(JSON, 图像) 数据，为卫星图像可以自动驱动结构化OSM更新的闭环系统铺平了道路。源代码可在 https://github.com/amir-zsh/OSMGen 获取。

title: Stochastic Shortest Path with Sparse Adversarial Costs
summary: We study the adversarial Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem with sparse costs under full-information feedback. In the known transition setting, existing bounds based on Online Mirror Descent (OMD) with negative-entropy regularization scale with $\sqrt{\log S A}$, where $SA$ is the size of the state-action space. While we show that this is optimal in the worst-case, this bound fails to capture the benefits of sparsity when only a small number $M \ll SA$ of state-action pairs incur cost. In fact, we also show that the negative-entropy is inherently non-adaptive to sparsity: it provably incurs regret scaling with $\sqrt{\log S}$ on sparse problems. Instead, we propose a family of $\ell_r$-norm regularizers ($r \in (1,2)$) that adapts to the sparsity and achieves regret scaling with $\sqrt{\log M}$ instead of $\sqrt{\log SA}$. We show this is optimal via a matching lower bound, highlighting that $M$ captures the effective dimension of the problem instead of $SA$. Finally, in the unknown transition setting the benefits of sparsity are limited: we prove that even on sparse problems, the minimax regret for any learner scales polynomially with $SA$.
tldr: This paper analyzes the Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem with sparse adversarial costs, proposes a new regularization method adaptive to sparsity, and provides regret bounds. They prove the limitations of sparsity benefits in the unknown transition setting.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了具有稀疏对抗成本的随机最短路径（SSP）问题，提出了一种新的适应稀疏性的正则化方法，并提供了遗憾界限。他们证明了在未知转移设置中，稀疏性收益的局限性。
summary_zh: 我们研究了具有完整信息反馈下，代价稀疏的对抗性随机最短路径(SSP)问题。在已知转移概率的设置下，现有的基于负熵正则化在线镜像下降(OMD)的界限与$\sqrt{\log S A}$成比例关系，其中$SA$是状态-动作空间的大小。虽然我们证明了这是最坏情况下的最优结果，但当只有小部分$M \ll SA$的状态-动作对产生代价时，这个界限无法捕捉到稀疏性的优势。事实上，我们也证明了负熵本质上不适应稀疏性：它在稀疏问题上必然会产生与$\sqrt{\log S}$成比例关系的遗憾。相反，我们提出了一系列$\ell_r$-范数正则化器 ($r \in (1,2)$)，它可以适应稀疏性，并实现与$\sqrt{\log M}$而非$\sqrt{\log SA}$成比例关系的遗憾。我们通过匹配的下界证明了这是最优的，强调了$M$捕捉了问题的有效维度，而不是$SA$。最后，在未知转移概率的设置下，稀疏性的优势是有限的：我们证明了即使在稀疏问题上，任何学习者的极小极大遗憾都与$SA$呈多项式比例关系。

title: SonarSweep: Fusing Sonar and Vision for Robust 3D Reconstruction via Plane Sweeping
summary: Accurate 3D reconstruction in visually-degraded underwater environments remains a formidable challenge. Single-modality approaches are insufficient: vision-based methods fail due to poor visibility and geometric constraints, while sonar is crippled by inherent elevation ambiguity and low resolution. Consequently, prior fusion technique relies on heuristics and flawed geometric assumptions, leading to significant artifacts and an inability to model complex scenes. In this paper, we introduce SonarSweep, a novel, end-to-end deep learning framework that overcomes these limitations by adapting the principled plane sweep algorithm for cross-modal fusion between sonar and visual data. Extensive experiments in both high-fidelity simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that SonarSweep consistently generates dense and accurate depth maps, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods across challenging conditions, particularly in high turbidity. To foster further research, we will publicly release our code and a novel dataset featuring synchronized stereo-camera and sonar data, the first of its kind.
tldr: SonarSweep is a novel deep learning framework that fuses sonar and visual data using a plane sweep algorithm for robust 3D reconstruction in challenging underwater environments, outperforming SOTA methods.
tldr_zh: SonarSweep是一个新颖的深度学习框架，它使用平面扫描算法融合声纳和视觉数据，以在具有挑战性的水下环境中实现强大的3D重建，并且优于最先进的方法。
summary_zh: 水下视觉退化环境中的精确3D重建仍然是一个巨大的挑战。单一模态方法不足以胜任：基于视觉的方法由于能见度差和几何约束而失效，而声纳则受到固有仰角模糊和低分辨率的限制。因此，以往的融合技术依赖于启发式方法和有缺陷的几何假设，导致显著伪像且无法建模复杂场景。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的端到端深度学习框架SonarSweep，通过将基于原理的平面扫描算法应用于声纳和视觉数据之间的跨模态融合，克服了这些限制。在高保真模拟和真实环境中的大量实验表明，SonarSweep能够持续生成密集且精确的深度图，在具有挑战性的条件下（尤其是在高混浊度中）显著优于最先进的方法。为了促进进一步的研究，我们将公开发布我们的代码和一个包含同步立体相机和声纳数据的新数据集，这是同类数据集中首个。

title: Tailored robotic training improves hand function and proprioceptive processing in stroke survivors with proprioceptive deficits: A randomized controlled trial
summary: Precision rehabilitation aims to tailor movement training to improve outcomes. We tested whether proprioceptively-tailored robotic training improves hand function and neural processing in stroke survivors. Using a robotic finger exoskeleton, we tested two proprioceptively-tailored approaches: Propriopixel Training, which uses robot-facilitated, gamified movements to enhance proprioceptive processing, and Virtual Assistance Training, which reduces robotic aid to increase reliance on self-generated feedback. In a randomized controlled trial, forty-six chronic stroke survivors completed nine 2-hour sessions of Standard, Propriopixel or Virtual training. Among participants with proprioceptive deficits, Propriopixel ((Box and Block Test: 7 +/- 4.2, p=0.002) and Virtual Assistance (4.5 +/- 4.4 , p=0.068) yielded greater gains in hand function (Standard: 0.8 +/- 2.3 blocks). Proprioceptive gains correlated with improvements in hand function. Tailored training enhanced neural sensitivity to proprioceptive cues, evidenced by a novel EEG biomarker, the proprioceptive Contingent Negative Variation. These findings support proprioceptively-tailored training as a pathway to precision neurorehabilitation.
tldr: This paper presents a randomized controlled trial demonstrating that proprioceptively-tailored robotic training (Propriopixel and Virtual Assistance) improves hand function and proprioceptive processing in stroke survivors with proprioceptive deficits, evidenced by improved hand function and a novel EEG biomarker.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一项随机对照试验，结果表明，针对本体感觉定制的机器人训练（Propriopixel 和虚拟辅助）可改善本体感觉缺陷中风幸存者的手功能和本体感觉处理能力，表现为手功能的改善和一种新型脑电图生物标志物。
summary_zh: 精准康复旨在定制运动训练以改善治疗效果。我们测试了本体感觉定制的机器人训练是否能改善卒中幸存者的手功能和神经处理能力。使用机器人手指外骨骼，我们测试了两种本体感觉定制的方法：本体像素训练，它利用机器人辅助的、游戏化的运动来增强本体感觉处理；以及虚拟辅助训练，它减少机器人辅助，以增加对自身产生的反馈的依赖。在一项随机对照试验中，四十六名慢性卒中幸存者完成了九次、每次两小时的标准训练、本体像素训练或虚拟训练课。在存在本体感觉缺陷的参与者中，本体像素训练（积木测试：7 +/- 4.2，p=0.002）和虚拟辅助训练（4.5 +/- 4.4，p=0.068）在手功能方面产生了更大的提升（标准训练：0.8 +/- 2.3 块）。本体感觉的改善与手功能的改善相关。定制的训练增强了神经对本体感觉线索的敏感性，这由一种新的脑电生物标志物——本体感觉条件性负变动电位所证实。这些发现支持将本体感觉定制的训练作为精准神经康复的途径。

title: Reducing Robotic Upper-Limb Assessment Time While Maintaining Precision: A Time Series Foundation Model Approach
summary:
Purpose: Visually Guided Reaching (VGR) on the Kinarm robot yields sensitive kinematic biomarkers but requires 40-64 reaches, imposing time and fatigue burdens. We evaluate whether time-series foundation models can replace unrecorded trials from an early subset of reaches while preserving the reliability of standard Kinarm parameters.
  Methods: We analyzed VGR speed signals from 461 stroke and 599 control participants across 4- and 8-target reaching protocols. We withheld all but the first 8 or 16 reaching trials and used ARIMA, MOMENT, and Chronos models, fine-tuned on 70 percent of subjects, to forecast synthetic trials. We recomputed four kinematic features of reaching (reaction time, movement time, posture speed, maximum speed) on combined recorded plus forecasted trials and compared them to full-length references using ICC(2,1).
  Results: Chronos forecasts restored ICC >= 0.90 for all parameters with only 8 recorded trials plus forecasts, matching the reliability of 24-28 recorded reaches (Delta ICC <= 0.07). MOMENT yielded intermediate gains, while ARIMA improvements were minimal. Across cohorts and protocols, synthetic trials replaced reaches without materially compromising feature reliability.
  Conclusion: Foundation-model forecasting can greatly shorten Kinarm VGR assessment time. For the most impaired stroke survivors, sessions drop from 4-5 minutes to about 1 minute while preserving kinematic precision. This forecast-augmented paradigm promises efficient robotic evaluations for assessing motor impairments following stroke.
tldr: This paper explores using time-series foundation models to forecast unrecorded trials in robotic upper-limb assessments, significantly reducing assessment time while maintaining kinematic precision, especially for stroke survivors.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用时间序列基础模型来预测机器人上肢评估中未记录的试验，从而显著缩短评估时间，同时保持运动学精度，尤其适用于中风幸存者。
summary_zh:
目的：在 Kinarm 机器人上进行的视觉引导抓取 (VGR) 能够产生灵敏的运动学生物标志物，但这需要40-64次抓取，造成时间和疲劳负担。我们评估时序基础模型是否可以在保留标准 Kinarm 参数可靠性的前提下，替换早期抓取子集中未记录的试验。
方法：我们分析了来自 461 名卒中患者和 599 名对照参与者的 VGR 速度信号，数据来自于 4 靶标和 8 靶标抓取协议。我们仅保留了前 8 或 16 次抓取试验，并使用 ARIMA、MOMENT 和 Chronos 模型（在 70% 的受试者上进行微调）来预测合成试验。我们重新计算了抓取的四个运动学特征（反应时间、运动时间、姿势速度、最大速度），这些特征基于记录的试验加上预测的试验，并使用 ICC(2,1) 将其与完整长度的参考数据进行比较。
结果：仅用 8 次记录试验加上预测，Chronos 预测就恢复了所有参数 ICC >= 0.90，与 24-28 次记录抓取的可靠性相当 (Delta ICC <= 0.07)。MOMENT 产生了中等程度的增益，而 ARIMA 的改进则微乎其微。在不同的队列和协议中，合成试验替换了抓取，而没有显著损害特征的可靠性。
结论：基础模型预测可以大大缩短 Kinarm VGR 评估时间。对于受损最严重的卒中幸存者，评估时间从 4-5 分钟降至约 1 分钟，同时保持了运动学精度。这种预测增强范式有望实现有效的机器人评估，用于评估卒中后的运动障碍。

title: Single-agent Reinforcement Learning Model for Regional Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
summary: Several studies have employed reinforcement learning (RL) to address the challenges of regional adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC) and achieved promising results. In this field, existing research predominantly adopts multi-agent frameworks. However, the adoption of multi-agent frameworks presents challenges for scalability. Instead, the Traffic signal control (TSC) problem necessitates a single-agent framework. TSC inherently relies on centralized management by a single control center, which can monitor traffic conditions across all roads in the study area and coordinate the control of all intersections. This work proposes a single-agent RL-based regional ATSC model compatible with probe vehicle technology. Key components of the RL design include state, action, and reward function definitions. To facilitate learning and manage congestion, both state and reward functions are defined based on queue length, with action designed to regulate queue dynamics. The queue length definition used in this study differs slightly from conventional definitions but is closely correlated with congestion states. More importantly, it allows for reliable estimation using link travel time data from probe vehicles. With probe vehicle data already covering most urban roads, this feature enhances the proposed method's potential for widespread deployment. The method was comprehensively evaluated using the SUMO simulation platform. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model effectively mitigates large-scale regional congestion levels via coordinated multi-intersection control.
tldr: This paper proposes a single-agent reinforcement learning model for regional adaptive traffic signal control using probe vehicle data, aiming to improve scalability compared to multi-agent approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于单智能体强化学习的区域自适应交通信号控制模型，该模型利用探测车辆数据，旨在提高相对于多智能体方法的可扩展性。
summary_zh: 许多研究已经采用强化学习(RL)来应对区域自适应交通信号控制(ATSC)的挑战，并取得了可喜的成果。在该领域，现有研究主要采用多智能体框架。然而，采用多智能体框架对可扩展性提出了挑战。相反，交通信号控制(TSC)问题需要一个单智能体框架。TSC本质上依赖于单个控制中心的集中管理，该控制中心可以监控研究区域内所有道路的交通状况，并协调所有交叉口的控制。本研究提出了一种基于单智能体RL的区域ATSC模型，该模型与探测车技术兼容。RL设计的关键组成部分包括状态、动作和奖励函数的定义。为了促进学习和管理拥堵，状态和奖励函数均基于排队长度定义，动作设计用于调节排队动态。本研究中使用的排队长度定义与传统定义略有不同，但与拥堵状态密切相关。更重要的是，它允许利用来自探测车的链路行程时间数据进行可靠的估计。由于探测车数据已经覆盖了大多数城市道路，这一特性增强了所提出方法的广泛部署潜力。该方法已使用SUMO仿真平台进行了全面评估。实验结果表明，所提出的模型通过协调的多交叉口控制有效地缓解了大规模区域拥堵水平。

title: On Improvisation and Open-Endedness: Insights for Experiential AI
summary: Improvisation-the art of spontaneous creation that unfolds moment-to-moment without a scripted outcome-requires practitioners to continuously sense, adapt, and create anew. It is a fundamental mode of human creativity spanning music, dance, and everyday life. The open-ended nature of improvisation produces a stream of novel, unrepeatable moments-an aspect highly valued in artistic creativity. In parallel, open-endedness (OE)-a system's capacity for unbounded novelty and endless "interestingness"-is exemplified in natural or cultural evolution and has been considered "the last grand challenge" in artificial life (ALife). The rise of generative AI now raises the question in computational creativity (CC) research: What makes a "good" improvisation for AI? Can AI learn to improvise in a genuinely open-ended way? In this work-in-progress paper, we report insights from in-depth interviews with 6 experts in improvisation across dance, music, and contact improvisation. We draw systemic connections between human improvisational arts and the design of future experiential AI agents that could improvise alone or alongside humans-or even with other AI agents-embodying qualities of improvisation drawn from practice: active listening (umwelt and awareness), being in the time (mindfulness and ephemerality), embracing the unknown (source of randomness and serendipity), non-judgmental flow (acceptance and dynamical stability, balancing structure and surprise (unpredictable criticality at edge of chaos), imaginative metaphor (synaesthesia and planning), empathy, trust, boundary, and care (mutual theory of mind), and playfulness and intrinsic motivation (maintaining interestingness).
tldr: This work-in-progress paper explores insights from human improvisation practices (dance, music) to inform the design of future experiential AI agents capable of improvisation, highlighting qualities like active listening, embracing the unknown, and empathy.
tldr_zh: 这篇进行中的论文通过对舞蹈、音乐等人类即兴创作实践的观察，探索未来能够进行即兴创作的体验式人工智能代理的设计，强调了积极倾听、拥抱未知和共情等品质。
summary_zh: 即兴创作是一种自发创造的艺术，其分分秒秒展开，没有预先设定的结果，需要实践者不断地感知、适应和重新创造。它是人类创造力的一种基本模式，横跨音乐、舞蹈和日常生活。即兴创作的开放式性质产生了一连串新颖、不可重复的瞬间——这是艺术创造力中备受重视的一个方面。与此同时，开放性（OE）——一个系统具有无限新颖性和无尽“趣味性”的能力——在自然或文化进化中得到了体现，并被认为是人工生命（ALife）领域的“最后一大挑战”。生成式人工智能的兴起现在提出了计算创造力（CC）研究中的一个问题：对于人工智能来说，什么才是“好的”即兴创作？人工智能能否以一种真正开放的方式学习即兴创作？在这篇进行中的论文中，我们报告了对舞蹈、音乐和接触即兴领域的6位即兴创作专家进行深入访谈的见解。我们从人类即兴艺术与未来体验式人工智能代理的设计中建立系统性联系，这些代理可以单独、与人类或甚至与其他人工智能代理一起进行即兴创作，并体现从实践中汲取的即兴创作特质：积极倾听（环境和意识），处在当下（正念和短暂性），拥抱未知（随机性和意外发现的来源），非批判性流动（接受和动态稳定性），平衡结构和惊喜（混沌边缘的不可预测临界性），富于想象力的隐喻（联觉和规划），共情、信任、界限和关怀（相互心智理论），以及玩耍和内在动机（保持趣味性）。

title: GDROS: A Geometry-Guided Dense Registration Framework for Optical-SAR Images under Large Geometric Transformations
summary: Registration of optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) remote sensing images serves as a critical foundation for image fusion and visual navigation tasks. This task is particularly challenging because of their modal discrepancy, primarily manifested as severe nonlinear radiometric differences (NRD), geometric distortions, and noise variations. Under large geometric transformations, existing classical template-based and sparse keypoint-based strategies struggle to achieve reliable registration results for optical-SAR image pairs. To address these limitations, we propose GDROS, a geometry-guided dense registration framework leveraging global cross-modal image interactions. First, we extract cross-modal deep features from optical and SAR images through a CNN-Transformer hybrid feature extraction module, upon which a multi-scale 4D correlation volume is constructed and iteratively refined to establish pixel-wise dense correspondences. Subsequently, we implement a least squares regression (LSR) module to geometrically constrain the predicted dense optical flow field. Such geometry guidance mitigates prediction divergence by directly imposing an estimated affine transformation on the final flow predictions. Extensive experiments have been conducted on three representative datasets WHU-Opt-SAR dataset, OS dataset, and UBCv2 dataset with different spatial resolutions, demonstrating robust performance of our proposed method across different imaging resolutions. Qualitative and quantitative results show that GDROS significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in all metrics. Our source code will be released at: https://github.com/Zi-Xuan-Sun/GDROS.
tldr: The paper introduces GDROS, a geometry-guided dense registration framework for optical and SAR images, which leverages CNN-Transformer hybrid features, multi-scale correlation, and least squares regression to achieve robust registration results even with large geometric transformations. It claims state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为GDROS的几何引导密集配准框架，用于光学和SAR图像的配准。该框架利用CNN-Transformer混合特征、多尺度相关性和最小二乘回归，即使在存在大的几何变换的情况下也能实现鲁棒的配准结果。论文声称在多个数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 光学和合成孔径雷达(SAR)遥感图像配准是图像融合和视觉导航任务的关键基础。由于它们之间的模态差异，这项任务尤其具有挑战性，主要表现为严重的非线性辐射差异(NRD)、几何畸变和噪声变化。在大几何变换下，现有的基于经典模板和基于稀疏关键点的策略难以实现光学-SAR图像对的可靠配准结果。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种几何引导的密集配准框架GDROS，它利用了全局跨模态图像交互。首先，我们通过一个CNN-Transformer混合特征提取模块从光学和SAR图像中提取跨模态深度特征，在此基础上构建并迭代细化多尺度4D相关体积，以建立逐像素的密集对应关系。随后，我们实现了一个最小二乘回归(LSR)模块来对预测的密集光流场进行几何约束。这种几何引导通过直接将估计的仿射变换强加于最终的光流预测上来减轻预测的发散。在三个具有代表性的数据集WHU-Opt-SAR数据集、OS数据集和UBCv2数据集上进行了广泛的实验，这些数据集具有不同的空间分辨率，证明了我们提出的方法在不同成像分辨率下的鲁棒性能。定性和定量的结果表明，GDROS在所有指标上都显著优于当前最先进的方法。我们的源代码将在以下网址发布：https://github.com/Zi-Xuan-Sun/GDROS。

title: MambaNetLK: Enhancing Colonoscopy Point Cloud Registration with Mamba
summary: Accurate 3D point cloud registration underpins reliable image-guided colonoscopy, directly affecting lesion localization, margin assessment, and navigation safety. However, biological tissue exhibits repetitive textures and locally homogeneous geometry that cause feature degeneracy, while substantial domain shifts between pre-operative anatomy and intra-operative observations further degrade alignment stability. To address these clinically critical challenges, we introduce a novel 3D registration method tailored for endoscopic navigation and a high-quality, clinically grounded dataset to support rigorous and reproducible benchmarking. We introduce C3VD-Raycasting-10k, a large-scale benchmark dataset with 10,014 geometrically aligned point cloud pairs derived from clinical CT data. We propose MambaNetLK, a novel correspondence-free registration framework, which enhances the PointNetLK architecture by integrating a Mamba State Space Model (SSM) as a cross-modal feature extractor. As a result, the proposed framework efficiently captures long-range dependencies with linear-time complexity. The alignment is achieved iteratively using the Lucas-Kanade algorithm. On the clinical dataset, C3VD-Raycasting-10k, MambaNetLK achieves the best performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods, reducing median rotation error by 56.04% and RMSE translation error by 26.19% over the second-best method. The model also demonstrates strong generalization on ModelNet40 and superior robustness to initial pose perturbations. MambaNetLK provides a robust foundation for 3D registration in surgical navigation. The combination of a globally expressive SSM-based feature extractor and a large-scale clinical dataset enables more accurate and reliable guidance systems in minimally invasive procedures like colonoscopy.
tldr: The paper introduces MambaNetLK, a novel 3D point cloud registration framework using Mamba SSMs for endoscopic navigation, and presents a large-scale clinical dataset, C3VD-Raycasting-10k, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance and robustness in colonoscopy registration.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 MambaNetLK，一种使用 Mamba SSM 的新型 3D 点云配准框架，用于内窥镜导航，并提出了一个大规模临床数据集 C3VD-Raycasting-10k，展示了在结肠镜检查配准方面的最先进性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 三维点云的精确配准是可靠图像引导结肠镜检查的基础，直接影响病灶定位、边缘评估和导航安全。然而，生物组织表现出重复纹理和局部均匀的几何结构，导致特征退化，而术前解剖结构与术中观察结果之间的显著领域偏移进一步降低了配准稳定性。为了应对这些临床上的关键挑战，我们提出了一种专为内窥镜导航定制的全新三维配准方法，以及一个高质量、具有临床基础的数据集，以支持严谨且可重复的基准测试。我们推出了C3VD-Raycasting-10k，这是一个大规模基准数据集，包含10,014个几何对齐的点云对，这些点云对源自临床CT数据。我们提出了一种新颖的无对应关系的配准框架MambaNetLK，该框架通过集成Mamba状态空间模型（SSM）作为跨模态特征提取器，增强了PointNetLK架构。因此，所提出的框架能够以线性时间复杂度有效地捕获长程依赖关系。通过Lucas-Kanade算法迭代实现配准。在临床数据集C3VD-Raycasting-10k上，与最先进的方法相比，MambaNetLK取得了最佳性能，中值旋转误差降低了56.04%，RMSE平移误差降低了26.19%（相较于第二好的方法）。该模型还展示了在ModelNet40上的强大泛化能力以及对初始姿态扰动的优异鲁棒性。MambaNetLK为外科导航中的三维配准提供了稳健的基础。基于全局表达性SSM的特征提取器与大规模临床数据集的结合，使得在结肠镜检查等微创手术中能够实现更准确和更可靠的引导系统。

title: Improving the Robustness of Control of Chaotic Convective Flows with Domain-Informed Reinforcement Learning
summary: Chaotic convective flows arise in many real-world systems, such as microfluidic devices and chemical reactors. Stabilizing these flows is highly desirable but remains challenging, particularly in chaotic regimes where conventional control methods often fail. Reinforcement Learning (RL) has shown promise for control in laminar flow settings, but its ability to generalize and remain robust under chaotic and turbulent dynamics is not well explored, despite being critical for real-world deployment. In this work, we improve the practical feasibility of RL-based control of such flows focusing on Rayleigh-Bénard Convection (RBC), a canonical model for convective heat transport. To enhance generalization and sample efficiency, we introduce domain-informed RL agents that are trained using Proximal Policy Optimization across diverse initial conditions and flow regimes. We incorporate domain knowledge in the reward function via a term that encourages Bénard cell merging, as an example of a desirable macroscopic property. In laminar flow regimes, the domain-informed RL agents reduce convective heat transport by up to 33%, and in chaotic flow regimes, they still achieve a 10% reduction, which is significantly better than the conventional controllers used in practice. We compare the domain-informed to uninformed agents: Our results show that the domain-informed reward design results in steady flows, faster convergence during training, and generalization across flow regimes without retraining. Our work demonstrates that elegant domain-informed priors can greatly enhance the robustness of RL-based control of chaotic flows, bringing real-world deployment closer.
tldr: This paper improves the robustness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) control for chaotic convective flows by incorporating domain knowledge into the reward function, demonstrating improved performance and generalization compared to conventional methods and uninformed RL agents.
tldr_zh: 本文通过将领域知识融入奖励函数，提高了强化学习（RL）对混沌对流控制的鲁棒性，与传统方法和无信息RL智能体相比，表现出更好的性能和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 混沌对流流动出现在许多实际系统中，例如微流控设备和化学反应器。稳定这些流动非常理想，但仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在传统控制方法经常失效的混沌状态下。强化学习（RL）已显示出在层流控制中的潜力，但其在混沌和湍流动力学下推广和保持鲁棒性的能力尚未得到充分探索，尽管这对于实际部署至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提高了基于RL控制此类流动的实际可行性，重点关注瑞利-贝纳德对流（RBC），这是对流热传输的典型模型。为了增强泛化能力和样本效率，我们引入了领域相关的RL智能体，这些智能体使用近端策略优化在不同的初始条件和流动状态下进行训练。我们在奖励函数中融入了领域知识，通过一项鼓励贝纳德胞合并的项，作为一种理想的宏观属性的例子。在层流状态下，领域相关的RL智能体将对流热传输降低了高达33％，而在混沌流动状态下，它们仍然实现了10％的降低，这比实践中使用的传统控制器要好得多。我们将领域相关的智能体与领域无关的智能体进行了比较：结果表明，领域相关的奖励设计可以实现稳定的流动，在训练过程中更快的收敛，以及跨流动状态的泛化，而无需重新训练。我们的工作表明，优雅的领域相关先验知识可以极大地增强基于RL的混沌流控制的鲁棒性，从而使实际部署更接近现实。

title: Study on Supply Chain Finance Decision-Making Model and Enterprise Economic Performance Prediction Based on Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: To improve decision-making and planning efficiency in back-end centralized redundant supply chains, this paper proposes a decision model integrating deep learning with intelligent particle swarm optimization. A distributed node deployment model and optimal planning path are constructed for the supply chain network. Deep learning such as convolutional neural networks extracts features from historical data, and linear programming captures high-order statistical features. The model is optimized using fuzzy association rule scheduling and deep reinforcement learning, while neural networks fit dynamic changes. A hybrid mechanism of "deep learning feature extraction - intelligent particle swarm optimization" guides global optimization and selects optimal decisions for adaptive control. Simulations show reduced resource consumption, enhanced spatial planning, and in dynamic environments improved real-time decision adjustment, distribution path optimization, and robust intelligent control.
tldr: The paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning-based model for supply chain finance decision-making, combining deep learning feature extraction with intelligent particle swarm optimization to enhance efficiency and optimize resource consumption.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的供应链金融决策模型，结合深度学习特征提取和智能粒子群优化，以提高效率并优化资源消耗。
summary_zh: 为了提高后端集中式冗余供应链的决策和规划效率，本文提出了一种将深度学习与智能粒子群优化相结合的决策模型。针对供应链网络构建了分布式节点部署模型和最优规划路径。利用卷积神经网络等深度学习方法从历史数据中提取特征，并用线性规划捕获高阶统计特征。该模型通过模糊关联规则调度和深度强化学习进行优化，同时利用神经网络拟合动态变化。一种“深度学习特征提取-智能粒子群优化”混合机制指导全局优化，并为自适应控制选择最优决策。仿真结果表明，该方法降低了资源消耗，增强了空间规划，并且在动态环境中改善了实时决策调整、分发路径优化以及稳健的智能控制。

title: Multi-Mapcher: Loop Closure Detection-Free Heterogeneous LiDAR Multi-Session SLAM Leveraging Outlier-Robust Registration for Autonomous Vehicles
summary: As various 3D light detection and ranging (LiDAR) sensors have been introduced to the market, research on multi-session simultaneous localization and mapping (MSS) using heterogeneous LiDAR sensors has been actively conducted. Existing MSS methods mostly rely on loop closure detection for inter-session alignment; however, the performance of loop closure detection can be potentially degraded owing to the differences in the density and field of view (FoV) of the sensors used in different sessions.
