In this study, we challenge the existing paradigm that relies heavily on loop detection modules and propose a novel MSS framework, called Multi-Mapcher, that employs large-scale map-to-map registration to perform inter-session initial alignment, which is commonly assumed to be infeasible, by leveraging outlier-robust 3D point cloud registration. Next, after finding inter-session loops by radius search based on the assumption that the inter-session initial alignment is sufficiently precise, anchor node-based robust pose graph optimization is employed to build a consistent global map. As demonstrated in our experiments, our approach shows substantially better MSS performance for various LiDAR sensors used to capture the sessions and is faster than state-of-the-art approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/multi-mapcher.
tldr: The paper presents Multi-Mapcher, a novel multi-session SLAM framework for heterogeneous LiDAR sensors that avoids loop closure detection by using outlier-robust map-to-map registration and anchor node-based pose graph optimization, demonstrating superior performance compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为Multi-Mapcher的新型多会话SLAM框架，用于异构激光雷达传感器。该框架通过使用鲁棒的地图到地图配准和基于锚节点的姿态图优化，避免了传统的回环检测，并展示了优于现有方法的性能。
summary_zh: 随着市场上涌现出各种3D激光雷达（LiDAR）传感器，利用异构LiDAR传感器进行多会话同时定位与建图（MSS）的研究也日益活跃。现有的MSS方法主要依赖回环检测进行会话间对齐；然而，由于不同会话所用传感器的密度和视场（FoV）差异，回环检测的性能可能会降低。在本研究中，我们挑战了过度依赖回环检测模块的现有范式，并提出了一种名为Multi-Mapcher的新型MSS框架，该框架采用大规模地图到地图的配准来执行会话间初始对齐，这通常被认为是不可行的，但通过利用具有鲁棒性的3D点云配准得以实现。接下来，基于会话间初始对齐足够精确的假设，通过半径搜索找到会话间环路后，采用基于锚节点的鲁棒位姿图优化来构建一致的全局地图。正如我们的实验所证明，我们的方法在用于捕获会话的各种LiDAR传感器上表现出明显更好的MSS性能，并且比最先进的方法更快。我们的代码可在https://github.com/url-kaist/multi-mapcher获取。

title: FGO MythBusters: Explaining how Kalman Filter variants achieve the same performance as FGO in navigation applications
summary: Sliding window-factor graph optimization (SW-FGO) has gained more and more attention in navigation research due to its robust approximation to non-Gaussian noises and nonlinearity of measuring models. There are lots of works focusing on its application performance compared to extended Kalman filter (EKF) but there is still a myth at the theoretical relationship between the SW-FGO and EKF. In this paper, we find the necessarily fair condition to connect SW-FGO and Kalman filter variants (KFV) (e.g., EKF, iterative EKF (IEKF), robust EKF (REKF) and robust iterative EKF (RIEKF)). Based on the conditions, we propose a recursive FGO (Re-FGO) framework to represent KFV under SW-FGO formulation. Under explicit conditions (Markov assumption, Gaussian noise with L2 loss, and a one-state window), Re-FGO regenerates exactly to EKF/IEKF/REKF/RIEKF, while SW-FGO shows measurable benefits in nonlinear, non-Gaussian regimes at a predictable compute cost. Finally, after clarifying the connection between them, we highlight the unique advantages of SW-FGO in practical phases, especially on numerical estimation and deep learning integration. The code and data used in this work is open sourced at https://github.com/Baoshan-Song/KFV-FGO-Comparison.
tldr: This paper analyzes the theoretical relationship between sliding window-factor graph optimization (SW-FGO) and Kalman filter variants, demonstrating their equivalence under specific conditions and highlighting the advantages of SW-FGO in more complex scenarios. It makes the observation that under certain conditions, FGO degenerates exactly to EKF, and opensources code to verify the claims.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了滑动窗口因子图优化 (SW-FGO) 和卡尔曼滤波器变体之间的理论关系，证明了它们在特定条件下的等价性，并强调了 SW-FGO 在更复杂场景中的优势。它指出在某些条件下，FGO 会完全退化为 EKF，并开源了代码来验证这些论断。
summary_zh: 滑动窗口因子图优化(SW-FGO)因其对非高斯噪声和测量模型非线性的稳健逼近，在导航研究中越来越受到关注。相比扩展卡尔曼滤波器(EKF)，许多工作侧重于其应用性能，但SW-FGO和EKF之间的理论关系仍然存在一定神秘性。在本文中，我们找到了连接SW-FGO和卡尔曼滤波器变体(KFV)（例如：EKF、迭代EKF(IEKF)、鲁棒EKF(REKF)和鲁棒迭代EKF(RIEKF)）的必要公平条件。基于这些条件，我们提出了一个递归FGO (Re-FGO)框架，以在SW-FGO公式下表示KFV。在显式条件（马尔可夫假设、具有L2损失的高斯噪声以及单状态窗口）下，Re-FGO可以精确地重现EKF/IEKF/REKF/RIEKF，而SW-FGO在非线性、非高斯情况下显示出可衡量的优势，并具有可预测的计算成本。最后，在阐明它们之间的联系后，我们重点介绍了SW-FGO在实际阶段的独特优势，尤其是在数值估计和深度学习集成方面。本工作中使用的所有代码和数据已在https://github.com/Baoshan-Song/KFV-FGO-Comparison上开源。

title: Balancing Interpretability and Performance in Motor Imagery EEG Classification: A Comparative Study of ANFIS-FBCSP-PSO and EEGNet
summary: Achieving both accurate and interpretable classification of motor imagery EEG remains a key challenge in brain computer interface (BCI) research. This paper compares a transparent fuzzy reasoning approach (ANFIS-FBCSP-PSO) with a deep learning benchmark (EEGNet) using the BCI Competition IV-2a dataset. The ANFIS pipeline combines filter bank common spatial pattern feature extraction with fuzzy IF-THEN rules optimized via particle swarm optimization, while EEGNet learns hierarchical spatial temporal representations directly from raw EEG data. In within-subject experiments, the fuzzy neural model performed better (68.58 percent +/- 13.76 percent accuracy, kappa = 58.04 percent +/- 18.43), while in cross-subject (LOSO) tests, the deep model exhibited stronger generalization (68.20 percent +/- 12.13 percent accuracy, kappa = 57.33 percent +/- 16.22). The study provides practical guidance for selecting MI-BCI systems according to design goals: interpretability or robustness across users. Future investigations into transformer based and hybrid neuro symbolic frameworks are expected to advance transparent EEG decoding.
tldr: The paper compares ANFIS-FBCSP-PSO and EEGNet for motor imagery EEG classification, finding ANFIS performs better within-subject, while EEGNet shows stronger cross-subject generalization, offering insights into balancing interpretability and robustness in BCI design.
tldr_zh: 该论文比较了ANFIS-FBCSP-PSO和EEGNet在运动想象脑电分类中的表现，发现ANFIS在受试者内部表现更好，而EEGNet在受试者之间表现出更强的泛化能力，为平衡脑机接口设计中的可解释性和鲁棒性提供了见解。
summary_zh: 在脑机接口(BCI)研究中，实现运动想象脑电信号的准确且可解释的分类仍然是一个关键挑战。本文利用BCI竞赛IV-2a数据集，将一种透明模糊推理方法 (ANFIS-FBCSP-PSO) 与深度学习基准模型 (EEGNet) 进行了比较。ANFIS流程结合了滤波器组共空间模式特征提取与通过粒子群优化算法优化的模糊IF-THEN规则，而EEGNet直接从原始脑电数据中学习分层时空表示。在被试内实验中，模糊神经模型表现更佳（准确率为68.58% +/- 13.76%，Kappa系数为58.04% +/- 18.43）；而在被试间（留一被试法，LOSO）测试中，深度模型表现出更强的泛化能力（准确率为68.20% +/- 12.13%，Kappa系数为57.33% +/- 16.22）。该研究为根据设计目标选择MI-BCI系统提供了实际指导：可解释性或跨用户的鲁棒性。未来对基于Transformer和混合神经符号框架的研究预计将推进透明的脑电解码。

title: POSESTITCH-SLT: Linguistically Inspired Pose-Stitching for End-to-End Sign Language Translation
summary: Sign language translation remains a challenging task due to the scarcity of large-scale, sentence-aligned datasets. Prior arts have focused on various feature extraction and architectural changes to support neural machine translation for sign languages. We propose POSESTITCH-SLT, a novel pre-training scheme that is inspired by linguistic-templates-based sentence generation technique. With translation comparison on two sign language datasets, How2Sign and iSign, we show that a simple transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture outperforms the prior art when considering template-generated sentence pairs in training. We achieve BLEU-4 score improvements from 1.97 to 4.56 on How2Sign and from 0.55 to 3.43 on iSign, surpassing prior state-of-the-art methods for pose-based gloss-free translation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of template-driven synthetic supervision in low-resource sign language settings.
tldr: The paper introduces POSESTITCH-SLT, a pre-training scheme for sign language translation that uses linguistically-inspired templates to generate synthetic sentence pairs, resulting in improved BLEU scores over prior methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了POSESTITCH-SLT，一种用于手语翻译的预训练方案，该方案使用受语言学启发的模板来生成合成句子对，从而提高了BLEU分数，优于先前的方法。
summary_zh: 手语翻译由于缺乏大规模、句子对齐的数据集仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。先前的研究主要集中于各种特征提取和架构改变，以支持手语的神经机器翻译。我们提出POSESTITCH-SLT，一种受到基于语言模板的句子生成技术启发的全新预训练方案。通过在两个手语数据集How2Sign和iSign上的翻译比较，我们表明，在训练中考虑模板生成的句子对时，一个简单的基于Transformer的编码器-解码器架构优于先前的研究。我们在How2Sign上实现了BLEU-4分数从1.97到4.56的提升，在iSign上实现了从0.55到3.43的提升，超过了先前基于姿态的无词语翻译的最先进方法。结果表明，在低资源手语环境中，模板驱动的合成监督的有效性。

title: Image-based ground distance detection for crop-residue-covered soil
summary: Conservation agriculture features a soil surface covered with crop residues, which brings benefits of improving soil health and saving water. However, one significant challenge in conservation agriculture lies in precisely controlling the seeding depth on the soil covered with crop residues. This is constrained by the lack of ground distance information, since current distance measurement techniques, like laser, ultrasonic, or mechanical displacement sensors, are incapable of differentiating whether the distance information comes from the residue or the soil. This paper presents an image-based method to get the ground distance information for the crop-residues-covered soil. This method is performed with 3D camera and RGB camera, obtaining depth image and color image at the same time. The color image is used to distinguish the different areas of residues and soil and finally generates a mask image. The mask image is applied to the depth image so that only the soil area depth information can be used to calculate the ground distance, and residue areas can be recognized and excluded from ground distance detection. Experimentation shows that this distance measurement method is feasible for real-time implementation, and the measurement error is within plus or minus 3mm. It can be applied in conservation agriculture machinery for precision depth seeding, as well as other depth-control-demanding applications like transplant or tillage.
tldr: The paper presents an image-based method using a 3D and RGB camera to accurately measure ground distance in crop-residue-covered soil by distinguishing and excluding residue areas from depth measurements, enabling precision depth seeding in conservation agriculture.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于图像的方法，该方法使用 3D 和 RGB 相机准确测量作物残留物覆盖土壤中的地面距离，通过区分并排除深度测量中的残留物区域，从而实现在保护性农业中进行精确的深度播种。
summary_zh: 免耕农业的特点是土壤表面覆盖着作物残茬，这带来了改善土壤健康和节约用水的益处。然而，免耕农业面临的一个重大挑战在于精确控制覆盖作物残茬土壤上的播种深度。这受到缺乏地面距离信息的限制，因为当前的距离测量技术，如激光、超声波或机械位移传感器，无法区分距离信息来自残茬还是土壤。本文提出了一种基于图像的方法来获取覆盖作物残茬土壤的地面距离信息。该方法利用3D相机和RGB相机，同时获取深度图像和彩色图像。彩色图像用于区分残茬和土壤的不同区域，并最终生成一个掩模图像。掩模图像被应用于深度图像，从而只有土壤区域的深度信息可以被用于计算地面距离，而残茬区域可以被识别并从地面距离检测中排除。实验表明，这种距离测量方法对于实时实现是可行的，并且测量误差在正负3mm以内。它可以应用于免耕农业机械的精准深度播种，以及其他对深度控制有要求的应用，如移栽或耕作。

title: Variational Autoencoder for Calibration: A New Approach
summary: In this paper we present a new implementation of a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for the calibration of sensors. We propose that the VAE can be used to calibrate sensor data by training the latent space as a calibration output. We discuss this new approach and show a proof-of-concept using an existing multi-sensor gas dataset. We show the performance of the proposed calibration VAE and found that it was capable of performing as calibration model while performing as an autoencoder simultaneously. Additionally, these models have shown that they are capable of creating statistically similar outputs from both the calibration output as well as the reconstruction output to their respective truth data. We then discuss the methods of future testing and planned expansion of this work.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel application of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) for sensor calibration, demonstrating its ability to perform as a calibration model while simultaneously acting as an autoencoder, with promising results on a multi-sensor gas dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种变分自编码器(VAE)在传感器校准中的新应用，展示了其在作为校准模型的同时充当自编码器的能力，并在多传感器气体数据集上取得了可喜的成果。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于传感器校准的变分自编码器（VAE）的新实现。我们提出利用VAE，通过训练隐空间作为校准输出来校准传感器数据。我们探讨了这种新方法，并使用现有的多传感器气体数据集展示了概念验证。结果表明所提出的校准VAE能够同时作为校准模型和自编码器运行。此外，这些模型表明，从校准输出和重构输出均能生成与其各自真实数据统计相似的结果。最后，我们讨论了未来测试的方法和该项工作的计划扩展。

title: A Streaming Sparse Cholesky Method for Derivative-Informed Gaussian Process Surrogates Within Digital Twin Applications
summary: Digital twins are developed to model the behavior of a specific physical asset (or twin), and they can consist of high-fidelity physics-based models or surrogates. A highly accurate surrogate is often preferred over multi-physics models as they enable forecasting the physical twin future state in real-time. To adapt to a specific physical twin, the digital twin model must be updated using in-service data from that physical twin. Here, we extend Gaussian process (GP) models to include derivative data, for improved accuracy, with dynamic updating to ingest physical twin data during service. Including derivative data, however, comes at a prohibitive cost of increased covariance matrix dimension. We circumvent this issue by using a sparse GP approximation, for which we develop extensions to incorporate derivatives. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the prediction accuracy of the derivative-enhanced sparse GP method produces improved models upon dynamic data additions. Lastly, we apply the developed algorithm within a DT framework to model fatigue crack growth in an aerospace vehicle.
tldr: This paper presents a streaming sparse Cholesky method for derivative-informed Gaussian Processes, enabling more accurate and dynamically updated surrogates for digital twin applications by incorporating derivative data to improve prediction accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于导数信息的稀疏高斯过程的流式稀疏Cholesky方法，通过结合导数数据以提高预测精度，从而为数字孪生应用提供更准确和动态更新的替代模型。
summary_zh: 数字孪生旨在模拟特定物理资产（或孪生体）的行为，它们可以由高保真度的基于物理的模型或代理模型组成。高精度代理模型通常优先于多物理场模型，因为它们能够实时预测物理孪生体的未来状态。为了适应特定的物理孪生体，数字孪生模型必须使用来自该物理孪生体的在役数据进行更新。在此，我们将高斯过程（GP）模型扩展到包含导数数据，以提高准确性，并进行动态更新以摄取在役的物理孪生体数据。然而，包含导数数据会带来协方差矩阵维度增加的巨大成本。我们通过使用稀疏GP近似来规避这个问题，并为此开发了包含导数的扩展。数值实验表明，经过动态数据添加后，导数增强的稀疏GP方法的预测精度能够产生改进的模型。最后，我们将开发的算法应用于DT框架中，以模拟航空航天器中的疲劳裂纹扩展。

title: Aspiration-based Perturbed Learning Automata in Games with Noisy Utility Measurements. Part A: Stochastic Stability in Non-zero-Sum Games
summary: Reinforcement-based learning has attracted considerable attention both in modeling human behavior as well as in engineering, for designing measurement- or payoff-based optimization schemes. Such learning schemes exhibit several advantages, especially in relation to filtering out noisy observations. However, they may exhibit several limitations when applied in a distributed setup. In multi-player weakly-acyclic games, and when each player applies an independent copy of the learning dynamics, convergence to (usually desirable) pure Nash equilibria cannot be guaranteed. Prior work has only focused on a small class of games, namely potential and coordination games. To address this main limitation, this paper introduces a novel payoff-based learning scheme for distributed optimization, namely aspiration-based perturbed learning automata (APLA). In this class of dynamics, and contrary to standard reinforcement-based learning schemes, each player's probability distribution for selecting actions is reinforced both by repeated selection and an aspiration factor that captures the player's satisfaction level. We provide a stochastic stability analysis of APLA in multi-player positive-utility games under the presence of noisy observations. This is the first part of the paper that characterizes stochastic stability in generic non-zero-sum games by establishing equivalence of the induced infinite-dimensional Markov chain with a finite dimensional one. In the second part, stochastic stability is further specialized to weakly acyclic games.
tldr: This paper introduces Aspiration-based Perturbed Learning Automata (APLA) and analyzes its stochastic stability in multi-player positive-utility games with noisy observations, claiming a first characterization of stochastic stability in generic non-zero-sum games.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于意愿的扰动学习自动机（APLA），并分析了其在具有噪声观测的多人正效用博弈中的随机稳定性，声称首次表征了通用非零和博弈中的随机稳定性。
summary_zh: 基于强化学习的方法在人行为建模以及工程应用中，尤其是在设计基于测量或收益的优化方案方面，都引起了广泛关注。这类学习方案展现出诸多优势，特别是在滤除噪声观测方面。然而，当应用于分布式环境中时，它们可能会表现出一些局限性。在多玩家弱无环博弈中，当每个玩家应用学习动态的独立副本时，无法保证收敛到（通常期望的）纯纳什均衡。先前的工作仅关注于一小类博弈，即势博弈和协调博弈。为了解决这个主要局限性，本文提出了一种用于分布式优化的新型基于收益的学习方案，即基于期望的扰动学习自动机（APLA）。在这种动态中，与标准的基于强化学习的方案相反，各个玩家选择动作的概率分布不仅受到重复选择的强化，还受到一个反映玩家满意程度的期望因子的强化。我们提供了在存在噪声观测的情况下，APLA在多玩家正效用博弈中的随机稳定性分析。这是本文的第一部分，通过建立诱导的无限维马尔可夫链与有限维马尔可夫链的等价性，来表征一般非零和博弈中的随机稳定性。在第二部分中，随机稳定性被进一步专门化到弱无环博弈。

title: Learning to Car-Follow Using an Inertia-Oriented Driving Technique: A Before-and-After Study on a Closed Circuit
summary: For decades, car following and traffic flow models have assumed that drivers default driving strategy is to maintain a safe distance. Several previous studies have questioned whether the Driving to Keep Distance is a traffic invariant. Therefore, the acceleration deceleration torque asymmetry of drivers must necessarily determine the observed patterns of traffic oscillations. Those studies indicate that drivers can adopt alternative CF strategies, such as Driving to Keep Inertia, by following basic instructions. The present work extends the evidence from previous research by showing the effectiveness of a DI course that immediately translates into practice on a closed circuit. Twelve drivers were invited to follow a lead car that varied its speed on a real circuit. Then, the driver took a DI course and returned to the same real car following scenario. Drivers generally adopted DD as the default CF mode in the pretest, both in field and simulated PC conditions, yielding very similar results. After taking the full DI course, drivers showed significantly less acceleration, deceleration, and speed variability than did the pretest, both in the field and in the simulated conditions, which indicates that drivers adopted the DI strategy. This study is the first to show the potential of adopting a DI strategy in a real circuit.
tldr: This paper investigates a "Driving to Keep Inertia" (DI) strategy in car-following using a before-and-after study on a closed circuit, finding that drivers can adopt this alternative strategy after training, resulting in smoother driving behavior than the traditional "Driving to Keep Distance" (DD) strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了一种“保持惯性驾驶”（DI）策略在车辆跟随中的应用，通过在封闭赛道上的前后对比研究发现，驾驶员经过训练后可以采用这种替代策略，从而比传统的“保持距离驾驶”（DD）策略产生更平稳的驾驶行为。
summary_zh: 数十年来，车辆跟随和交通流模型一直假设驾驶员的默认驾驶策略是保持安全距离。若干先前的研究对“保持距离驾驶”是否是交通不变性提出了质疑。因此，驾驶员的加速减速扭矩不对称性必然会决定观察到的交通振荡模式。这些研究表明，驾驶员可以通过遵循基本指示，采取替代的车辆跟随策略，例如“保持惯性驾驶”。目前的工作通过展示DI课程（驾驶惯性课程）的有效性，拓展了先前研究的证据，该课程能够立即转化为封闭回路上的实践。邀请了12名驾驶员跟随一辆在实际赛道上改变速度的引导车。然后，驾驶员参加了一个DI课程，并返回到相同的实际车辆跟随场景。在预测试中，无论是在实地还是在模拟的PC条件下，驾驶员普遍采用DD（距离驾驶）作为默认的车辆跟随模式，并产生了非常相似的结果。在完成了整个DI课程后，驾驶员在实地和模拟条件下均表现出比预测试显著更少的加速、减速和速度变化，这表明驾驶员采用了DI（惯性驾驶）策略。这项研究首次展示了在实际赛道上采用DI策略的潜力。

title: Design and Development of a Modular Bucket Drum Excavator for Lunar ISRU
summary: In-Situ Resource Utilization (ISRU) is one of the key technologies for enabling sustainable access to the Moon. The ability to excavate lunar regolith is the first step in making lunar resources accessible and usable. This work presents the development of a bucket drum for the modular robotic system MoonBot, as part of the Japanese Moonshot program. A 3D-printed prototype made of PLA was manufactured to evaluate its efficiency through a series of sandbox tests. The resulting tool weighs 4.8 kg and has a volume of 14.06 L. It is capable of continuous excavation at a rate of 777.54 kg/h with a normalized energy consumption of 0.022 Wh/kg. In batch operation, the excavation rate is 172.02 kg/h with a normalized energy consumption of 0.86 Wh per kilogram of excavated material. The obtained results demonstrate the successful implementation of the concept. A key advantage of the developed tool is its compatibility with the modular MoonBot robotic platform, which enables flexible and efficient mission planning. Further improvements may include the integration of sensors and an autonomous control system to enhance the excavation process.
tldr: This paper presents the design and testing of a bucket drum excavator for lunar regolith, integrated with the MoonBot modular robotic platform, demonstrating effective excavation rates and energy consumption in sandbox tests.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于月球风化层的铲斗式挖掘机的设计和测试，该挖掘机与 MoonBot 模块化机器人平台集成，并在沙箱测试中展示了有效的挖掘速率和能耗。
summary_zh: 原位资源利用（ISRU）是实现月球可持续访问的关键技术之一。挖掘月球风化层是使月球资源可获取和可利用的第一步。这项工作介绍了作为日本登月计划一部分的模块化机器人系统MoonBot的铲斗滚筒的开发。制造了一个由PLA制成的3D打印原型，通过一系列沙箱测试评估其效率。最终工具重4.8千克，体积为14.06升。它能够以777.54千克/小时的速率进行连续挖掘，标准化能耗为0.022瓦时/千克。在批处理操作中，挖掘速率为172.02千克/小时，标准化能耗为每挖掘一千克物料0.86瓦时。获得的结果表明该概念的成功实施。所开发工具的一个关键优势是其与模块化MoonBot机器人平台的兼容性，从而实现了灵活高效的任务规划。未来的改进可能包括集成传感器和自主控制系统，以增强挖掘过程。

title: Runge-Kutta Approximations for Direct Coning Compensation Applying Lie Theory
summary: The integration of gyroscope measurements is an essential task for most navigation systems. Modern vehicles typically use strapdown systems, such that gyro integration requires coning compensation to account for the sensor's rotation during the integration. Many coning compensation algorithms have been developed and a few are reviewed. This work introduces a new class of coning correction algorithm built directly from the classical Runge-Kutta integration routines. A simple case is shown to collapse to one of the most popular coning algorithms and a clear procedure for generating higher-order algorithms is presented.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel class of coning compensation algorithms for gyro integration in navigation systems, derived from Runge-Kutta methods, offering a procedure for generating higher-order algorithms.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的锥形补偿算法，用于导航系统中陀螺仪的积分，该算法源自龙格-库塔方法，并提供了一种生成高阶算法的程序。
summary_zh: 陀螺仪测量值的积分是大多数导航系统的一项基本任务。现代车辆通常使用捷联系统，因此陀螺仪积分需要进行圆锥误差补偿，以解决传感器在积分过程中发生的旋转。已经开发了许多圆锥误差补偿算法，本文回顾了其中的一些。本研究介绍了一种基于经典龙格-库塔积分例程直接构建的新型圆锥误差校正算法。结果表明，一个简单的案例可以简化为最流行的圆锥算法之一，并且提出了生成更高阶算法的清晰步骤。
